_meta.note: Categories and mechanics follow Pandora’s Box (Revised) first; Hero and other tier books where PB cross-references them. Example rows are paraphrased samples for chargen — use your PDFs for full write-ups.
_meta.relicDetails: On `birthrightType: "relic"`, optional `relicDetails` holds: `rating` (1–5 Relic dots), `tagIds` (from data/tags.json), `purviewId` + `purviewRating` (1–5) for a linked Purview hook, `evocation` and `motifsAndTags` text — confirm Imbue and Boons with Pandora’s Box.
_meta.creatureDetails: On `birthrightType: "creature"`, optional `creatureDetails.tagIds` lists master tags (appliesTo includes "creature") for Flairs / fiction.
_meta.introduction: Birthrights are divine gifts and assets: Relics, Guides, Followers, Cults, Creatures, and more. At Hero tier, this wizard uses **seven** Birthright points total on the Birthrights step (Visitation / Hero ch. 3). Finishing Touches at Hero only offers **two extra Knacks** here — not a second Birthright pool stacked on top of the seven.
_meta.pointBudgets: Birthright **points** cap: **4** for Mortal / Origin (Finishing only) and Sorcerer Finishing; **7** for Hero (Birthrights step only); **11** for Demigod / God (combined Birthrights + Finishing Birthright points in this wizard — confirm at your table). Each pick lists its point cost.

typesTable.what: Myth-imbued gear — weapons, jewelry, vehicles; often unlocks Purviews or Knacks tied to the object.
Teacher, ancestor shade, spirit ally, or messenger who offers knowledge and stunts.
Mortal or minor mythic assistants, specialists, or a small retinue.
Companion beast, mount, or guardian entity with its own Health and Knacks/Flairs.
Worshippers, shrines, and rites that support your Legend and provide narrative leverage.

_meta.pbRelicCatalog: Keys prefixed `pb_relic_` are catalog rows indexed from SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf (Birthrights chapter: title + • dot rating). OCR-garbled titles were corrected where found. `description` and `mechanicalEffects` are **condensed summaries** generated from the PDF text via `scripts/refresh_pb_relics_from_pdf.py` (not full stat blocks—confirm tags, Knacks, Purviews, Evocation, and wording at the table). `relicDetails.purviewId` / `motifsAndTags` are best-effort hints from the printed Purviews / Motif lines. `god_relic_mjolnir` uses the same approach from Scion_God_Second_Edition_(Final_Download).pdf. Re-run the script after PDF updates; extend this file manually for Dragon / Demigod-only Relics.

relic.name: Relic (blank template)
relic.description: Design any mythic object with your Storyguide; set dots, Purviews, and Knacks per Pandora’s Box.
relic.mechanicalEffects: Spend Birthright points at chargen per tier book; track tags, Knacks, and Purview access attached to the Relic.

creature.name: Creature (blank template)
creature.description: Generic companion slot — stat Health, Defense, and Knacks/Flairs with the table.
creature.mechanicalEffects: Use Creature Birthright rules for dots, Health, Defense, and Knacks/Flairs.

follower.name: Follower (blank template)
follower.description: Name your retinue or specialist; define Skills and role with the book’s Follower rules.
follower.mechanicalEffects: Follower Birthright rules in Pandora’s Box / Hero.

cult.name: Cult (blank template)
cult.description: Shrines, faithful, and rites — scope with your Storyguide.
cult.mechanicalEffects: Cult Birthright rules in later tier books; not emphasized at Origin.

guide.name: Guide (blank template)
guide.description: Any guiding spirit or mentor archetype.
guide.mechanicalEffects: Guide rules in Pandora’s Box — Enhancement, narrative access, and Knacks per rating.

exRelicWeapon.name: Example: heirloom blade (Relic)
exRelicWeapon.description: Family sword rumoured to cut both steel and oath-breakers; motif of honour and lineage.
exRelicWeapon.mechanicalEffects: Often 2–3 dots: base Relic + Purview or Knack access; add Tags and Motifs in play.

exRelicJewelry.name: Example: ring of the storm (Relic)
exRelicJewelry.description: Sky-metal band that hums when danger nears; channels weather omens.
exRelicJewelry.mechanicalEffects: Higher-dot Relics stack multiple Purview/Boon hooks — price with your SG.

exGuideAncestor.name: Example: grandmother’s shade (Guide)
exGuideAncestor.description: Appears in smoke and old photographs to warn or teach family lore.
exGuideAncestor.mechanicalEffects: Guides commonly grant Enhancement to relevant rolls and story access to Underworld/ghost lore.

exGuideRaven.name: Example: talking raven courier (Guide)
exGuideRaven.description: Odin-style messenger — sarcastic, well-travelled, poor sense of volume.
exGuideRaven.mechanicalEffects: Low-dot Guide: narrow Enhancement + scouting scenes.

exFollowerDriver.name: Example: trusted driver / fixer (Follower)
exFollowerDriver.description: Knows every back alley, owes you more than money, carries a go-bag for divine nonsense.
exFollowerDriver.mechanicalEffects: Follower dots buy Skill ratings, Assets, and small teams per Pandora’s Box.

exFollowerScholar.name: Example: occult archivist (Follower)
exFollowerScholar.description: Runs a basement reading room full of banned bestiaries and polite warnings.
exFollowerScholar.mechanicalEffects: Two-dot follower can cover Academics/Occult support and safe-house scenes.

exCreatureHorse.name: Example: cloud-tread mount (Creature)
exCreatureHorse.description: Sleipnir-inspired steed — too clever, too fast, hates toll booths.
exCreatureHorse.mechanicalEffects: Creatures use separate Health tracks and Knack-like Flairs; higher dots = more Scale.

exCreatureHound.name: Example: iron-jawed guardian hound (Creature)
exCreatureHound.description: Bred to harry Titanspawn; whines when you skip walkies.
exCreatureHound.mechanicalEffects: Mid-tier companion: combat Assist, chase scenes, intimidation.

exCultStreetShrine.name: Example: alley shrine network (Cult)
exCultStreetShrine.description: Candles, graffiti sigils, and food offerings left where the homeless sleep safe.
exCultStreetShrine.mechanicalEffects: Cults grant Reach, rites, and social Infrastructure — see Hero / Pandora’s Box.

exCultOnline.name: Example: cryptid livestream cult (Cult)
exCultOnline.description: Fans who ‘donate’ Legend through memes and midnight watch parties.
exCultOnline.mechanicalEffects: Small cult: narrative leverage, rumor control, minor Resources.

pb_relic_amulet_of_dagon.name: AMULET OF DAGON (PB catalog)
pb_relic_amulet_of_dagon.description: No one knows where the Amulet of Dagon comes from, and no one knows to whom it originally belonged. It ap peared in a museum collection one day a hundred years ago and since then has been stolen, swiped, purloined, traded, fallen into other hands… no one has owned the amulet for longer than a handful of years at a time, and some people have possessed it for only a few minutes or a day.
pb_relic_amulet_of_dagon.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Chaos Motif: You don’t know what you don’t know. Knack: Spend 1 Momentum and gain 2 Enhancement 
when attempting to decipher unknown languages — whether 
mundane or some leaving of the Great Old Ones — or uncover 
mysteries connected to the Great Old Ones. The Storyguide is 
the final arbiter of what counts as uncovering mysteries. 
Flaw: Gain 2 Difficulty in circumstances in which the 
owner attempts to resist the commands or entreaties of the 
servants of Dagon or Mother Hydra; gain 1 Difficulty when 
attempting to resist the commands or entreaties of servants 
of any other Great Old One, including other Scions. Condensed from printed Relics p. 163.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: You don’t know what you don’t know.

pb_relic_amulet_of_the_hound.name: AMULET OF THE HOUND (PB catalog)
pb_relic_amulet_of_the_hound.description: A small object carved from jade, this tiny amulet is no bigger than the human thumb. It is not particularly old; early records place its creation in regions of China, but in truth, this is wildly incorrect and it was in fact a mere facsimile of artistic jeweler native to the area. In actuality, a French set tler aristocrat in the Louisiana area carved this amulet.
pb_relic_amulet_of_the_hound.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: War Motif: A potent little token for those who seek to become 
the beast. Knack: Spend 1 momentum to cause your jaw to extend, 
creating a large muzzle full of sharp canine-like teeth. For 
the duration of this scene, any bite attack deals one addition 
al point of damage.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags:
A potent little token for those who seek to become 
the beast.

pb_relic_apocalyptic_aegis.name: APOCALYPTIC AEGIS (PB catalog)
pb_relic_apocalyptic_aegis.description: These massive suits of armor cover their wearer from head to toe in supernaturally enhanced metal, exalting them as the answer to knights of old for a dead world devastated by war and destruction. The armors are exceedingly rare, rumored to be treasures forged by mythical forces right be fore the end of the World. It’s impossible to say whether by command of the Gods or the Titans — or both. The armor is an imposing engine of strength and resistance, a relic whose steps resonate with fearsome resolve.
pb_relic_apocalyptic_aegis.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Epic Strength Motif: My might and purpose are as steel, unwavering 
and pure. Tags: Cumbersome, Hard (3), Resistant (bulletproof), 
Weighty 
Enhancement: +2 to intimidation-related rolls while 
wearing the armor. 
Knack: The owner is immune to any environmental 
Complication or indirect damage as long as they wear the 
armor and the source of either isn’t a character of greater 
Tier than theirs. 
Knack: While inside the armor, the owner doesn’t need 
to breathe. 
Flaw: The armor is so bulky and imposing it’s almost 
impossible for its wearer to go unseen. Any stealth-related 
roll made while using it gains +3 difficulty.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags:
My might and purpose are as steel, unwavering 
and pure.

pb_relic_balmung.name: BALMUNG (PB catalog)
pb_relic_balmung.description: Enhancement: 1 general, or 2 when used against dra conic Titanspawn Tags: Lethal, Melee, Piercing, Two-Handed When Odin buried Balmung deep into the trunk of a tree, it was to issue a challenge to those who sought it. Only one deemed worthy and pure of purpose could wield this blade. Many tried to pull it from the tree, and all failed save one: the legendary hero Sigurd, slayer of the dragon Fafnir.
pb_relic_balmung.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: War Motif: Greatly desired by all but wielded only by the 
worthy. Enhancement: 1 general, or 2 when used against dra 
conic Titanspawn 
Tags: Lethal, Melee, Piercing, Two-Handed When Odin 
buried Balmung deep into the trunk of a tree, it was to issue 
a challenge to those who sought it. Only one deemed worthy 
and pure of purpose could wield this blade. Many tried to 
pull it from the tree, and all failed save one: the legendary 
hero Sigurd, slayer of the dragon Fafnir. Though it doesn’t 
declare who the King of England will be, Balmung is never 
theless a sword of great power known to slay dragons (sorry, 
Fafnir) and is coveted by would-be kings, relic collectors, and 
heroes looking to prove themselves worthy of recognition. 
Any Scion who wields Balmung is…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags:
Greatly desired by all but wielded only by the 
worthy.

pb_relic_basts_gaze.name: BAST’S GAZE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_basts_gaze.description: An ever-present truth of myths tells how felines thrive in the night, free to roam while relying on their unique kind of magic. Bast forged this pair of stylish glasses to affirm said myths into being, gifting them to Scions she believes can make best use of secret knowledge of the hidden systems of the world only cats are privy to. Their beautiful, round, royal blue lenses glimmer with moonlight and crafty cunning both elegant and dangerous.
pb_relic_basts_gaze.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Moon, Fortune Motif: Let the eyes of cats guide your way through the darkness. Knack: The wearer can imbue 1 Legend to gain +2 En 
hancement on Survival rolls and become able to see in total 
darkness, magical or mundane, for the remainder of the 
scene. This effect can only be activated at night. 
Flaw: After the wearer benefits from one of the glasses’ 
Knacks or uses them to activate a Moon or Fortune Boon, 
their eyes become cat-like for a full day. The unsettling eyes 
impose a level 1 Complication on all Social rolls made against 
people who can see them, disturbing people or making them 
feel as if they’re observed by a feline predator.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Let the eyes of cats guide your way through the darkness.

pb_relic_bennus_plume.name: BENNU’S PLUME (PB catalog)
pb_relic_bennus_plume.description: Enhancement: +1 when used for writing meant to enlighten or uplift Sometimes called the Egyptian phoenix, the bennu bird is a graceful heron venerated as a bringer of renewal and held as sacred to the gods of the sun —even jeal ous Aten.
pb_relic_bennus_plume.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Sun Motif: The sun always rises anew Enhancement: +1 when used for writing meant to 
enlighten or uplift Sometimes called the Egyptian phoenix, 
the bennu bird is a graceful heron venerated as a bringer of 
renewal and held as sacred to the gods of the sun —even jeal 
ous Aten. Bennu birds consecrated to Aten and his blinding 
light are boon companions to his devotees, and Scions who 
pluck a blue-gray feather from them find it channels Aten’s 
own power. All too often, it also serves as a channel for Aten’s 
attention and wrath — for the Titan does not share.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: The sun always rises anew

pb_relic_bolt_of_perun.name: BOLT OF PERUN (PB catalog)
pb_relic_bolt_of_perun.description: When Brȃn the Blessed took a mortal blow, he instructed his companions to behead him and bring him to London. To their surprise, his soul was strong, and his head continued to speak to them during the trip. He was buried where the Tow er of London now stands, but was later exhumed by one of many Scions to take the mantle of King Arthur, who claimed the Blessed’s protection was no longer needed now that they were around. Since his exhumation, Brȃn’s as active as ever.
pb_relic_bolt_of_perun.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: 1 to combat rolls when following Brȃn’s 
advice. 
Knack: The sight of the great King of Prydain strikes fear 
into the hearts of combatants. If they don’t know who is when 
they first see him, they will soon. When Brȃn’s head accompa 
nies you in battle, you may spend up to 5 Momentum to create 
a Complication on an enemy combatant. These Complications 
could be dropping weapons or creating an opening due to the 
shock of seeing Brȃn’s head. Flaw: An undead talking head is 
horrifying, no matter how charming his words are. When an 
SGC sees the head for the first time, they take a −1 attitude 
shift towards the Scion due to shock or disgust.

pb_relic_clarent_the_sword_of_peace.name: CLARENT, THE SWORD OF PEACE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_clarent_the_sword_of_peace.description: For a sword known as the Sword of Peace, Clarent has seen its share of bloodshed and treachery. No matter how much the king wishes for peace, there are situations where diplomacy fails, and the blade must be taken up. Last seen plunged into the chest of Arthur by the hand of dying Mor dred, who himself was impaled upon the spear Rhongo miant. Sometimes peace is not the cessation of war, but the tranquility of death itself.
pb_relic_clarent_the_sword_of_peace.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Death, Order Motif: Through hearts impaled, glory is won and lost. Knack: The user and those Fatebound to them reduce 
the cost of Critical stunts against each other by the strength 
of the Fatebinding while the user wields Clarent. 
Tags: Lethal, Melee, Piercing, Renowned, Two-handed, 
Unconcealable

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Through hearts impaled, glory is won and lost.

pb_relic_cursed_copper_goods.name: CURSED COPPER GOODS (PB catalog)
pb_relic_cursed_copper_goods.description: Wondrous treasures may be made by anyone brave enough to steal from Mishipeshu, who jealously guards the copper veins of his Underworld home with both vigilance and malice, denying it to God, Scion, and titanspawn alike. Those who manage to steal away a measure of cursed copper find it resonates with Mishipeshu’s own power, granting them dominion over water and death.
pb_relic_cursed_copper_goods.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Death, Water Motif: Terror comes from the World beneath. Knack: You instantly know if Mishipeshu is within (Leg 
end) miles of you. If you invest Legend, this effect extends to any Underworld-related threat, giving you a sense of both 
direction, distance, and nature. 
Flaw: Mishipeshu instantly knows if you are within 
(Legend) miles of him. Condensed from printed Relics p. 168.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Terror comes from the World beneath.

pb_relic_dagdas_basket.name: DAGDA’S BASKET (PB catalog)
pb_relic_dagdas_basket.description: The Dagda’s Cauldron is one of the four great treasures of the Tuatha Dé Danann. In one of its modern replicas, it in stead takes the (considerably more portable) form of a picnic basket full of food, though the owner has little control over what they pull out.
pb_relic_dagdas_basket.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Fertility Motif: Nourish and strengthen the weak and worthy. Knack: The basket can produce food on command, 
which disappears if not eaten by the end of the scene.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Nourish and strengthen the weak and worthy.

pb_relic_dagons_compass.name: DAGON’S COMPASS (PB catalog)
pb_relic_dagons_compass.description: While ancient Phoenicians did not have a compass in a way that resembles modern ones, they were nevertheless granted the means to navigate their way home by the God Dagon. This item can take a multitude of forms: a classic hand-held compass, a needle on a magnetized rock in a bowl of water, or even an app on a smartphone whose icon is the silhouette of a dolphin jumping from the water. No matter where a Scion is, this compass can guide them wherever they need to go or be — be it in the World or otherwise.
pb_relic_dagons_compass.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Journeys Motif: Wherever you go, there you are. Enhancement: 1 to finding or entering Terra Incognitae 
or Underworlds, 2 to navigating to anywhere else in the World.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Wherever you go, there you are.

pb_relic_darkhan_windhorse.name: DARKHAN WINDHORSE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_darkhan_windhorse.description: Enhancement: 1 Purviews: Journeys Motif: Freedom is a steed faster than the wind. No Tengri should be without a horse for long — so say the traditionalists, at least. Fortunately for Scions who live in ar eas where stables aren’t common, not all horses are flesh.
pb_relic_darkhan_windhorse.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: 1 
Purviews: Journeys 
Motif: Freedom is a steed faster than the wind. 
No Tengri should be without a horse for long — so say the 
traditionalists, at least. Fortunately for Scions who live in ar 
eas where stables aren’t common, not all horses are flesh. The 
great God Gudzir Kungker breeds a line of spirit-horses that 
he houses in specially made motorcycle mirrors and chrom 
ing, fitting them to expertly crafted machines of steel made 
by his cultists at Darkhan Ironworks. These motorcycles have 
the souls of horses if not their bodies, and their riders find it 
easy to travel deep into the lands of spirit and God alike. 
Knack: Gain access to the Pierce the Veil Knack (Sci 
on: Hero, p. 231).…

pb_relic_demonic_ayoyotes.name: DEMONIC AYOYOTES (PB catalog)
pb_relic_demonic_ayoyotes.description: It was common in the early years of the twentieth cen tury for stage and film to cross paths, with recordings of the atrical performances recorded and displayed to audiences the world over. German expressionist filmmaker Fritz Lang frett, a former vaudeville stagehand, undertook one such recording in 1924. His film, Der König in Gelb, is one of early cinema’s most elusive lost films. The recording comprised of two reels; the first remains in the hands of an anonymous wealthy collector.
pb_relic_demonic_ayoyotes.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Star, Death, Journey Motif: They recorded it. What madness! Knack: The fact that Langfrett was an adamant cultist 
in service to ancient entities from Aldebaran is unsurpris 
ingly missing from film history. In practice, the recording 
perfectly captured the ritual of The King in Yellow, sealing 
the rite’s mystical properties within a cage of celluloid. 
Viewing both reels of the film in their entirety has the same 
effect as a performance of the play, but without the necessity 
of actors or scripts. All that is required is a film projector of 
an appropriate age; no dice rolls are required to perform the 
ritual in this manner. 
Flaw: Perhaps mercifully, both reels are required for 
this performance; the second has been lost for almost a 
century. Should it be… Condensed from printed Relics p. 169.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: They recorded it. What madness!

pb_relic_designated_constellation.name: DESIGNATED CONSTELLATION (PB catalog)
pb_relic_designated_constellation.description: While modern science knows that stars shine from light-years away in space, Heroes of the Shén know they’re also Relics the Gods hand out in heaven as rewards for ser vices well-rendered. A Scion can’t hold his constellation in his hand, but he can manipulate its glittering bounty through the threads of his Fate as long as it shines overhead. The Theoi and other pantheons with zodiacs of their own occa sionally dole out constellations as well, but the practice is uncommon for anyone but the Shén.
pb_relic_designated_constellation.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Fortune, Stars Motif: All Fates are reflected in the stars. Knack: The constellation’s ruler can learn Muse’s Kiss 
for any kind of art as a Stars Boon. 
Knack: The Scion can spend a point of Legend to make 
his constellation impart a specific message to anyone in the 
World who divines or navigates by the stars. The message 
must be brief, no more than a sentence or two, and lasts until 
the character changes it to a new message. 
Flaws: This Relic’s abilities, and all Boons and marvels 
channeled through it, may only be used when the constella 
tion itself is visible in the sky.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: All Fates are reflected in the stars.

pb_relic_elder_sign_amulet.name: ELDER SIGN AMULET (PB catalog)
pb_relic_elder_sign_amulet.description: Calling: Guardian Motif: Holding the dark at bay This small, minted amulet of metal is typically no small er than half the circumference of one’s palm. It is inlaid with a marking that, although unsettling to look upon, is never theless beneficial for those who know how to wield it. These amulets are not made of any particular type of metal and there is nothing especially unique about its construction; instead, the potency relies upon the marking engraved upon it.
pb_relic_elder_sign_amulet.mechanicalEffects:
Knack: The Amulet functions in one of two ways. First 
ly, when physically placed between a Mythos entity and a 
target (often the wielder) it prevents the creature from mov 
ing past or touching anything behind the amulet. Doing so 
requires the wielder to spend One Momentum; holding the 
amulet in an outstretched hand while doing so is enough to 
repel the creature. The wielder may, if they choose, place the 
amulet somewhere (hanging it in a window or around the 
neck of a loved one) to extend that protection to wherever 
or whoever he has placed the amulet. Be aware that this use 
is unidirectional; holding out the amulet to one creature will 
not protect you from attack by a second creature behind 
you,… Condensed from printed Relics p. 171.

pb_relic_erich_zanns_viol.name: ERICH ZANN’S VIOL (PB catalog)
pb_relic_erich_zanns_viol.description: The battered case of Erich Zann’s viol contains a simple viol (also known as a cello) created by an expert craftsperson; her smooth, honey-colored wood seems to glow subtly, as if stage lights strike her, no matter what the current lighting. If the instrument were smaller, it might make a decent emer gency light, perhaps.
pb_relic_erich_zanns_viol.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Artistry, Chaos, Darkness Motif: Give of yourself to hold back the dark. Knack: By spending 1 Momentum, the user may imbue 
his music with a chaotic energy which soothes even Great Old 
Ones. Choose from either of the following options upon activat 
ing the viol. The user enters a Clash of Wills with an opponent; 
success causes the opponent to fall asleep regardless of other 
circumstance; the user gains 2 Enhancement to this roll. How 
ever, attacking or otherwise damaging the subject of the Knack 
causes him to immediately wake. Alternately, the cello’s user 
may choose to seal shut any portal, door, or other opening for 
a scene. There is no outer limit to the size of portal which can 
be closed, but it must be surrounded by a continuous bound 
ary. Technically, yes, you could…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Give of yourself to hold back the dark.

pb_relic_etiquette_and_protocol.name: ETIQUETTE AND PROTOCOL (PB catalog)
pb_relic_etiquette_and_protocol.description: Etiquette and Protocol does not permit an Annuna to force someone to act in a particular fashion, but she can make it more difficult to breach the peace she enforces. Upon activa tion, she enforces her sense of right behavior on those around her. They may not agree with her point of view — nothing about the Relic actually changes people’s minds — but she makes it hard for them to act outside of her defined bounds.
pb_relic_etiquette_and_protocol.mechanicalEffects:
Motif: I will demonstrate the proper way in all things. Flaws: Using a me requires taking a simple action to 
follow its instructions to the letter, activating the relic for 
the scene.
EXCALIBUR,

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: I will demonstrate the proper way in all things.

pb_relic_excalibur_the_sword_of_victory.name: EXCALIBUR, THE SWORD OF VICTORY (PB catalog)
pb_relic_excalibur_the_sword_of_victory.description: Considered to be one of the most powerful swords ever created; its power and the aura of kingship it bestows upon its bearer makes it sought by knaves, Knights, and self-styled kings. It is not by the blade alone that makes one worthy of sit ting upon a throne, but the wisdom it imparts its wielder: that power should be used in the best interests of the people and to grant fair justice.
pb_relic_excalibur_the_sword_of_victory.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Fortune, Order Motif: Power is given to those worthy, never taken. Enhancement: 3 when used to lead or rally a people 
Flaw: Wielders of Excalibur find themselves inex 
tricably Fatebound to it. When you take advantage of its 
Purviews, you may spend 1 Momentum, or create or Com 
pel a Fatebinding in a manner that involves Excalibur. At Demigod, one of the Scion’s Fatebindings must be Excalibur. 
If Excalibur is stolen or irreparably damaged, the Scion must 
undergo a quest to become worthy of using it once more.
Tags: Lethal, Melee, Renowned, Shockwave, Two-Hand 
ed, Unconcealable. Condensed from printed Relics p. 172.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Power is given to those worthy, never taken.

pb_relic_facemelter.name: FACEMELTER (PB catalog)
pb_relic_facemelter.description: Forged in a crucible of inspiration and rebellion by the Titan Prometheus, the Facemelter is a masterpiece of musical engineering. In its natural state, the relic takes the shape of a chrome guitar ornamented with a jet-black head stock and body. Finishes that look like rivulets of molten metal converge at its center and neck, hot to the touch and impressive to the sight.
pb_relic_facemelter.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Fire Motif: Through my inner fire, I shred. Enhancement: +2 to performances made to inspire 
anger or rebellion. 
Knack: The guitar needs no electricity or fuel to work 
in any of its shapes. 
Knack: The Facemelter suffers no damage from fire of any sort. 
Knack: The Facemelter can change into a heavy melee axe 
with the Brutal, Lethal, Melee, Piercing, Two-Handed, and Uncon 
cealable tags or a flamethrower with the Automatic, Brutal, Lethal, 
Loud, Messy, Ranged, Two-Handed, and Unconcealable tags. 
Flaw: Changing the Facemelter’s shape from guitar to 
weapon requires one successful performance roll. Changing 
it from a weapon into another shape requires a Technology 
roll. Both rolls are simple actions. 
Flaw: If the user rolls a botch whenever using…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Through my inner fire, I shred.

pb_relic_fame_pole_star.name: FAME POLE STAR (PB catalog)
pb_relic_fame_pole_star.description: The vivid white gem is cut as the exact replica of a little stylized star. No bigger than a die, it thrums with the power of hope and dreams. The more its owner believes in their own chance to achieve greatness, the more the gem shines golden, but its light likewise dies out when people falter on the path to stardom.
pb_relic_fame_pole_star.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Stars Motif: Stars are born on the stage, and they know their 
way back. Knack: The gem can shine a ray of light on command, 
pointing at the closest avenue where the Scion’s perfor 
mances would get a chance to shine.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags:
Stars are born on the stage, and they know their 
way back.

pb_relic_fearsome_nights_necklace.name: FEARSOME NIGHT’S NECKLACE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_fearsome_nights_necklace.description: This silver necklace ends with a pendant in the shape of an ornate snowflake made of onyxes. Its essence taps into the spaces and times between tour stops, when people spend nights on the road far from their houses and loved ones, alone with their thoughts.
pb_relic_fearsome_nights_necklace.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Darkness Motif: I know my fans. They speak to me as I sing to them. Enhancement: +1 to discover a person’s insecurities 
or fears. 
Flaw: The wearer becomes cold to the touch, imposing 
a level 1 Complication on social rolls made against people 
within short range, freezing small amounts of liquid upon 
prolonged contact, and leaving behind fingerprints of rime.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: I know my fans. They speak to me as I sing to them.

pb_relic_feather_cloak.name: FEATHER CLOAK (PB catalog)
pb_relic_feather_cloak.description: While Freyja’s may be the best-known, there are many feather cloaks in the World which, when worn, transform their wearer into a bird or other winged beast. The Swan Maidens, a Welsh German pop duo, are famed for their cloaks, integrating aerial stunts and bird song into their live performances. Lesser-known cloaks exist for crows, ravens, fruit bats, and more.
pb_relic_feather_cloak.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Animals (Birds) Motif: I embody the grace of my winged siblings. Tags: Soft, Innocuous 
Knack: The wearer may transform into the cloak’s asso 
ciated animal as a simple action, granting them the ability to 

 PANDORA’S BOX
fly and a total of +3 Enhancement divided among flying, sight, 
stealth, or other appropriate actions based on the animal. 
Tasks requiring human manipulation may be impossible, or 
subject to 1 to 3 Difficulty at the Storyguide’s discretion. Condensed from printed Relics p. 173.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: I embody the grace of my winged siblings.

pb_relic_fenrirs_fang.name: FENRIR’S FANG (PB catalog)
pb_relic_fenrirs_fang.description: Sharp are the fangs of wolf Titan Fenrir, and cold enough to pierce the sun’s fire-flesh. The wolf and his mad pups have hunted the sun time and again, and only the intervention of the Gods and their Scions has forestalled Ragnarok. From the wolf’s corpse, they pluck a fang — a long, sharp blade nearly a foot in length. These fangs make prized weapons, although many Æsir are disquieted by the distant howl that the weapon makes when swung.
pb_relic_fenrirs_fang.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Frost Motif: The World ends in ice Tags: Concealable, Lethal, Melee, Thrown 
Knack: Spend Momentum to have Fenrir’s Fang quench 
all lights and flames within long range. Flames and light 
sources large enough to have Scale are immune. This inflicts 
+1 Difficulty to vision-dependent actions in areas of low light, 
or +2 Difficulty in complete darkness. This effect persists for 
the rest of the scene.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: The World ends in ice

pb_relic_galatine.name: GALATINE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_galatine.description: For as long one remains illumined, one shall remain blessed. Granted to Sir Gawain by the Lady of the Lake, the sword Galatine is said to make its wielder invincible under the light of the sun. Though not as powerful or as sought-af ter as Excalibur, it nevertheless has become a relic of interest for those seeking to forge their own Knightly mantle and engage in glory-seeking quests.
pb_relic_galatine.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Sun Motif: The sun is divine. Enhancement: 1 when used in full view of the sun 
Flaw: If used at night, suffer a -1 to combat rolls using Galatine. 
Tags: Aggravated, Lethal, Melee, Renowned

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: The sun is divine.

pb_relic_giantsbane.name: GIANTSBANE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_giantsbane.description: Enhancement: 1 general, or 2 vs. foes of larger Size Any one who’s ever run afoul of the Æsir knows the thunderous power of Thor’s hammer Mjolnir, probably far better than they ever hoped to know it.
pb_relic_giantsbane.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Sky Motif: The flash and fury of the thunderstorm. Enhancement: 1 general, or 2 vs. foes of larger Size Any 
one who’s ever run afoul of the Æsir knows the thunderous 
power of Thor’s hammer Mjolnir, probably far better than they 
ever hoped to know it. The Norse guardian doesn’t like to part 
with his hammer, but he once broke off a small piece of its stone 
and gave it to the dwarves for use in forging a new weapon with 
its potent magic, destined for his child’s hand. That weapon 
was Giantsbane, the prodigious revolver with a barrel as long and as thick around as the forearm of the Scion who wields it. 
As the gun’s wielder cocks back the hammer, anyone nearby 
feels the thrill of ambient static electricity. With extraordinary 
stopping power and a… Condensed from printed Relics p. 174.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: The flash and fury of the thunderstorm.

pb_relic_goibnius_iron_ale.name: GOIBNIU’S IRON ALE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_goibnius_iron_ale.description: Enhancement: +2 to unravel puzzles or think one’s way through a troubling issue. This ever-full iron mug full of ale serves three purposes for Goibniu’s children and anyone else who receives one: it heals wounds, helps focus the mind on the task at hand, and restores the imbiber’s youth. As an add ed bonus (or drawback, depending on one’s point of view), the alcohol has no intoxicating effects.
pb_relic_goibnius_iron_ale.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Health Motif: Drinking alone or with friends, I seek and find clarity. Enhancement: +2 to unravel puzzles or think one’s way 
through a troubling issue. This ever-full iron mug full of ale 
serves three purposes for Goibniu’s children and anyone else 
who receives one: it heals wounds, helps focus the mind on 
the task at hand, and restores the imbiber’s youth. As an add 
ed bonus (or drawback, depending on one’s point of view), 
the alcohol has no intoxicating effects.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Drinking alone or with friends, I seek and find clarity.

pb_relic_golden_stag.name: GOLDEN STAG (PB catalog)
pb_relic_golden_stag.description: Enhancement: 2 general, or 3 while attempting stealth When Artemis was young, she captured four golden-horned deer and bade them pull her golden chariot. Though she sometimes travels this way still through Olympus’ steep passes, some of her Incarnations prefer to cruise in more modern style. When she lends her wheels out to her Scions, it’s this custom chopper bike they ride.
pb_relic_golden_stag.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Journeys Motif: Swift and agile as the deer. Enhancement: 2 general, or 3 while attempting stealth 
When Artemis was young, she captured four golden-horned 
deer and bade them pull her golden chariot. Though she 
sometimes travels this way still through Olympus’ steep passes, 
some of her Incarnations prefer to cruise in more modern style. 
When she lends her wheels out to her Scions, it’s this custom 
chopper bike they ride. Painted a bright gold, it sits low to the 
road, with an elongated frame and an engine that hums too qui 
etly — until revved up for effect. Faster and more maneuverable 
than any mortal motorcycle, the Golden Stag boasts a pair of 
deer antlers made of solid gold and comes with a sleek full-face 
helmet which acts as armor with…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Swift and agile as the deer.

pb_relic_green_glass_sword.name: GREEN GLASS SWORD (PB catalog)
pb_relic_green_glass_sword.description: This jagged greatsword looks too crude to justify its effectiveness, but the ease with whom it destroys its targets betrays the supernatural lethality simmering within. The horrible green glass it’s made of is no work of art but rather matter fused together by a weapon no man should have ever conceived, then imbued with its deadly legacy. Whoever wields it can harness the power of the atom itself, in all its destructive and unstoppable glory.
pb_relic_green_glass_sword.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Sun Motif: Destruction forged a weapon in the shape of itself. Tags: Brutal, Lethal, Melee, Versatile 
Knack: The owner becomes immune to indirect damage 
and Complications caused by radiation, provided the source 
of the damage isn’t a character of equal or greater Tier. 
Knack: The owner has +1 Defense against attacks made 
at Close range. When they use the Disarm Stunt (Scion: Or 
igin, p. 116), they may destroy a mundane weapon instead of 
simply disarming it.
GREEN MAN’S MASK (NEMETONDEVOS) 
Crafted from leaves of the greatest oak tree in all the 
land, in the days of old, this mask allowed its wearer to move 
unseen through the forests, blending in with the foliage and 
trees as though they were born to it like a nymph. In more 
modern days, it has taken form as a…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Destruction forged a weapon in the shape of itself.

pb_relic_haunted_hobby_horse.name: HAUNTED HOBBY HORSE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_haunted_hobby_horse.description: Knack: The rider of the Haunted Hobby Horse reduces the rank of all Complications by one (to a minimum of 1) to avoid detection while traveling through hostile territory. Flaw: The Scion must tell awful jokes or prank any one who detects them or they choose to engage with along their journey.
pb_relic_haunted_hobby_horse.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Deception, Journeys Motif: Just a trick of the light. Knack: The rider of the Haunted Hobby Horse reduces 
the rank of all Complications by one (to a minimum of 1) to 
avoid detection while traveling through hostile territory. 
Flaw: The Scion must tell awful jokes or prank any 
one who detects them or they choose to engage with along 
their journey. Consisting of a gaudily decorated horse skull 
mounted on the end of a sturdy staff, one wouldn’t think 
the haunted hobby horse good for aught else than being a 
distraction — which is precisely where its boon lies: When 
a Scion straddles the Haunted Hobby Horse (and they must 
straddle it), it cloaks them and renders them just invisible 
enough to pass unnoticed through difficult areas.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Just a trick of the light.

pb_relic_hill_striding_moccasins.name: HILL-STRIDING MOCCASINS (PB catalog)
pb_relic_hill_striding_moccasins.description: A Scion who wears a pair of these leather moccasins becomes incredibly fleet of foot, overtaking prey and out running pursuit with equal swiftness. Each pair is decorated with beads in the shapes of clouds, birds, and bolts of light ning, all to speed the Hero’s steps.
pb_relic_hill_striding_moccasins.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Epic Dexterity Motif: No hill too steep, nor too far. Knack: The wearer reduces the rank of all Complica 
tions by one to avoid difficult or dangerous terrain features. 
Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi, Condensed from printed Relics p. 178.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: No hill too steep, nor too far.

pb_relic_hurricane_jar.name: HURRICANE JAR (PB catalog)
pb_relic_hurricane_jar.description: To the untrained eye, this relic looks like any jar you might find in any house in the World. Perhaps it once housed jam, pickles, or some other condiment used to flavor a fam ily meal but has found a second life. However, looks can be deceiving, much like calm sea during a sunny day before it turns dark and tempestuous a few hours later. These jars, each imbued with just a bit of Juracán’s anger, often appear unbidden but never without need.
pb_relic_hurricane_jar.mechanicalEffects: Purviews: Chaos Motif: A tempest in a teapot, err… jar.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: A tempest in a teapot, err… jar.

pb_relic_internalized_instructions.name: INTERNALIZED INSTRUCTIONS (PB catalog)
pb_relic_internalized_instructions.description: Legendary Purviews: variable, see below Motif: I carry the proper way within me; it and I are one.
pb_relic_internalized_instructions.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: +2 or +3 to performing the declared 
task, see below. 
Dissolving an ancient me in liquor gifted by the highest 
of the Annuna and distilling by a secret process into gold 
and platinum tattoo ink permits the creation of Internalized 
Instructions, a tattooed me borne by the divine Annuna. 
When the rules of the universe truly live within someone, 
how can their reach ever exceed their grasp? When creat 
ing Internalized Instructions, choose a Purview and a task. 
Upon activation, the Annuna may either utilize Internalized 
Instructions for that task or may choose a different, tempo 
rary task aligned with any Purview to which she has access. 
If she uses Internalized Instructions for its… Condensed from printed Relics p. 179.

pb_relic_irish_muscle_car.name: IRISH MUSCLE CAR (PB catalog)
pb_relic_irish_muscle_car.description: The chariot is the traditional conveyance of battle for the Tuatha Dé Danann, favored by the Morrígan. A sturdy chariot pulled by noble steeds and bristling with weaponry could make a simple drive-by deadly in the hands of a skilled charioteer. Modern Scions prefer to pay homage to this tra dition with a different kind of horsepower. The Irish muscle car is usually a Mustang or Charger, tricked out with gad gets, guns, hidden blades, and more to make chases a dicey prospect for a Hero’s enemies.
pb_relic_irish_muscle_car.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Chaos Motif: The road is my battlefield. Knack: This vehicle constitutes a rank 2 Hazard Com 
plication for any other vehicle involved in a chase or race 
(Scion: Origin, p. 73). Once per scene, the driver of the Irish 
muscle car may gain one Momentum whenever the driver of 
another vehicle spends from the Tension Pool. 
Knack: This vehicle never runs out of fuel, and its 
driver always begins any chase or race with the Head Start 
Enhancement at rank 1, reflecting its ability to go from zero 
to breakneck in mere seconds. It applies only to the first lap. 
Flaws: Reduce the car’s Head Start Enhancement or Haz 
ard Complication by one rank at the end of any scene in which 
it was used in a chase or race without its driver or another 
occupant…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: The road is my battlefield.

pb_relic_jade_seal.name: JADE SEAL (PB catalog)
pb_relic_jade_seal.description: This seal, reminiscent of the ancient Heirloom Seal of China, is a small, rectangular cylinder made of jade with the bearer’s personal name and Legendary Title embossed on the end. The Shén give them to their Heroes with great frequency, to legitimize a Scion’s duties within the Celestial Bureaucracy and grant her a measure of judicial authority. Most Shén Scions grow used to carrying around forms on silk paper, dashing off quick prayers to work their marvels.
pb_relic_jade_seal.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Order Motif: I’m going to need that in triplicate.

 birthrights Condensed from printed Relics p. 180.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags:
I’m going to need that in triplicate.

 birthrights

pb_relic_kampilan.name: KAMPILAN (PB catalog)
pb_relic_kampilan.description: By all appearances, the kampilan is a simple, single edged sword with a distinct profile: a tapered blade that is much broader and thinner at the point than at its base. The pommel can feature several designs, but it most commonly depicts animals native to the Philippines. What makes the kampilan stand out, however, is that it comes with actual bells, if not whistles, that herald the arrival of its wielder — and the ferocity that comes with it.
pb_relic_kampilan.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Fortune Motif: Bring the islands with you wherever you go. Tags: Lethal, Melee, Flashy
KANAME–ISHI (•• TO ••••)
The Titan Namazu is held in place by the kaname-ishi, or 
pinning rock, which Takemikazuchi used to weigh down the 
Titan and limit her thrashing. In so doing, he quieted the earth 
quakes that shook Japan, or at least diminished them. Other 
kaname-ishi exist, often in the hands of Kami Scions who must 
subdue titanspawn. Although these stones are often little more 
than unworked stone, some are engraved with pictograms or 
prayers, or else wrapped in sacred shimenawa ropes. 
Tags: Bashing, Pushing, Stun, Thrown 
Knack: When purchasing the Line Drive Stunt after an 
attack with the kaname-ishi, you may imbue Legend to pin 
the foe under the stone’s immense…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Bring the islands with you wherever you go.

pb_relic_knuckles_of_the_mountain.name: KNUCKLES OF THE MOUNTAIN (PB catalog)
pb_relic_knuckles_of_the_mountain.description: These brass knuckles have polished stone along the palm that radiates warmth when held. Cabrakan’s children often gain a modicum of his strength, but these knuckles make an overwhelming opponent child’s play. Demigod Purviews: Epic Strength Motif: Inner strength given physical form.
pb_relic_knuckles_of_the_mountain.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: 1 to unarmed attacks 
Tags: Brutal, Grappling, Lethal 
Knack: The cost to purchase all Grapple Stunts is re 
duced by 1 success to a minimum of 0.

pb_relic_kukulkans_feather.name: K’UK’ULKAN’S FEATHER (PB catalog)
pb_relic_kukulkans_feather.description: Ào Guāng has politely requested (and then demanded, and then threatened, and then pleaded) for self-styled He roes to stop wrecking his palace. When Sun Wukong claimed a magically-expanding rod — the “pillar holding down the sea” — he inspired generations of copycats to rob Ào Guāng’s palace in search of similar wonders.
pb_relic_kukulkans_feather.mechanicalEffects:
Tags: Bashing, Melee, Reach, Stun 
Knack: When imbued with Legend, the staff shrinks 
to the size of a toothpick, giving it the Concealable tag or 
extends dramatically, granting it the Two-Handed tag and 
allowing the bearer to make melee attacks at short range.

pb_relic_lightning_axe.name: LIGHTNING AXE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_lightning_axe.description: Some have drawn comparisons between Thor’s hammer and Chac’s axe, but both Gods will be quick to tell you that they are not one in the same. Outside of the obvious, when Chac strikes the clouds (or rain-bearing snakes) with his axe, it produces rain, lightning, and thunder. It also does not require a belt or any other implements to be used — chalk up a victory for Chac. It does go well with his shield, if he does say so himself, but one need not wield both — however, it must be used honorably in battle.
pb_relic_lightning_axe.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Sky Motif: Bring down the sky’s might. Tags: Lethal, Melee, Thrown, Versatile 
Knack: By imbuing the axe with a point of Legend, the 
Scion too can crack open the sky and release rain, lightning, 
and thunder from the clouds, directing bolts of lightning 
towards any target for a scene — allowing the user to make 
melee attacks out to Long range. 
Flaw: Because of its affinity for lightning, and subse 
quently being a source of static electricity, any bearer of the 
Lightning Axe is surrounded by static electricity and all the 
trouble it can bring against others and electronics. 
Enhancement: 1 to Knockdown stunts and attacks us 
ing lightning.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Bring down the sky’s might.

pb_relic_magatama.name: MAGATAMA (PB catalog)
pb_relic_magatama.description: The magatama is a comma-shaped bead, made of pre cious stone or glass, that denotes high status and the authority to lead. The Japanese Gods use magatama for all manner of divine miracles. The most sacred set is the Yasakani no Maga tama, which Izanagi originally gave to Amaterasu as a symbol of her rulership of the Kami, and which she in turn gave to her grandson Ninigi as a symbol of his rulership of Japan. To this day, this necklace plays a role in the enthronement ceremony for Japanese emperors.
pb_relic_magatama.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Order, Prosperity Motif: By the grace of the Kami do I claim the right to lead. Knack: Each mask holds a different Knack. The masks 
must be worn for the entirety of the scene for its given effect 
to remain in place. 
The Goat-horned Mask: These masks are carved of wood, 
typically the older the wood the better, and painted with 
various shades of black. These faces, when worn, whisper to 
the wearer in the voices of a thousand children demanding 
nourishment. The wearer does not feel any ill effects due to 
hunger or thirst while they wear this mask, and they gain a 
3 Enhancement to hunting, tracking, or pursuing somebody 
that is marked as an enemy. While wearing the mask, they 
are subject to bouts of anger. The Spiral Mask: These masks are either carved from 
or coated in conical… Condensed from printed Relics p. 182.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: By the grace of the Kami do I claim the right to lead.

pb_relic_mermaids_scale.name: MERMAID’S SCALE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_mermaids_scale.description: Dagon keeps his mermaids close; only those who have won his best favor ever meet his beloved aquatic darlings. Those the mermaids themselves love best may be grant ed one scale plucked from their iridescent tails. Ancient knowledge of the Ilhm sings within the blood of the seaborn, granting the Scion visions of past events.
pb_relic_mermaids_scale.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Ocean Motif: I call to the Deep within myself. Flaws: The mermaid’s visions linger, distracting the Sci 
on. For the remainder of the scene, she suffers 1 Complication 
to all mental tasks more complex than remembering how a key 
works in a door, or 2 Complication if she asked an open-ended 
question. Failure to buy off the Complication leads to them 
pausing in their track or not paying any attention to their sur 
roundings. The visions fade at the end of the scene.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: I call to the Deep within myself.

pb_relic_mi_go_brain_cylinder.name: MI-GO BRAIN CYLINDER (PB catalog)
pb_relic_mi_go_brain_cylinder.description: This canister is small, often bound in an interwoven me tallic case that resembles brass. Prying away its casing reveals a variety of thin cables that contain and regulate fluids and electrical currents in equal measure. The cables themselves run into the cylinder’s liquid interior, which houses the ob ject’s true purpose; to house the organic matter of an alien be ing, complete with sentience.
pb_relic_mi_go_brain_cylinder.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Stars, Illusion Motif: Exceptional intellect constrained and bound. Knack: Spend 1 Momentum to add one success to rolls 
involving recalling or learning new information, as the mind 
within the cylinder whispers things you could not otherwise know. In addition, you can Spend 1 Momentum to gain one 
success to rolls involving reaction speed, as the mind cau 
tions you of dangers before you are aware of them. 
Flaw: The mind seeks to find other bodies to house 
itself, and it makes no secret of the fact that its protection 
and foreknowledge come at a price. This cost is typically to 
be paid at some future point, and is doubtless considerably 
high; if the sentience begins to feel that its price will not be 
paid, it becomes quite adversarial. Condensed from printed Relics p. 184.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Exceptional intellect constrained and bound.

pb_relic_monkeys_paw_of_the_second_sun.name: MONKEY’S PAW OF THE SECOND SUN (PB catalog)
pb_relic_monkeys_paw_of_the_second_sun.description: Little remains of the World as it was during the Sec ond Sun of the Teōtl except for the dark prison- World of the monkeys who held dominion over that age. This paw belonged to one of the unfortunates, lost as it reached des perately to escape its prison. It is withered and stiff, a single finger pointing in outrage; wielded as a talisman, it can evoke the shadow-stuff of that lost age… but it is filled with a dark and subtle mischief.
pb_relic_monkeys_paw_of_the_second_sun.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Deception Motif: The phantoms of a fallen World Knack: Once per scene, you may make a wish on the 
monkey’s paw, producing sumptuous food, fine clothing 
tailored for its intended wearer, subtle perfumes, or other 
luxuries. If you spend Momentum, you may instead conjure 
a bounty — enough of the chosen good to feed or outfit doz 
ens. At the end of the scene, these treasures quickly rot into 
darkness and maggots; anyone who partook of the food must 
succeed at a Resistance-based roll to keep it down. 
Flaw: Once per session, if the paw has been used, the 
screeching voices of the Monkeys of the Second World can 
make a demand — an action that will demean or embarrass 
the wielder for their amusement. If you refuse, the Sto 
ryguide gains one Tension.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: The phantoms of a fallen World

pb_relic_moonlight_bow.name: MOONLIGHT BOW (PB catalog)
pb_relic_moonlight_bow.description: ing of copper, silver, and gold, this bow is modeled after the one wielded by the Goddess Maroya, who hunted down the unworthy dead in the night, shooting beams of moonlight to banish them to oblivion. A more modest in appearance re curve bow in the modern era, scenes of Coaybay are etched into it. It has become popular among hunters, and even Arte mis has commented that she, too, wished she had such a bow.
pb_relic_moonlight_bow.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Moon Forged out of guanín, an alloy consist Motif: Hunt the undead by the light of the moon. Knack: When a Scion is facing down dishonorable 
undead, the arrows fired from the Moonlight Bow appear as 
brilliant beams of moonlight, and they deal one additional 
damage against such creatures after purchasing either the 
Inflict Injury or Critical Stunts

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Hunt the undead by the light of the moon.

pb_relic_murine_pipe.name: MURINE PIPE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_murine_pipe.description: It emerges on app stores with different names: Gor geous You, Beauty Unleashed, Handsome AI. It claims to be a special filter for selfies. It is, but what it won’t tell you is that a part of Māra’s divine essence is implanted in the code, tempting those who see pictures made with the filter to act impulsively or unwisely. By the time it’s identified and banned, another version’s already up. When you take this Relic, you always have the latest version of the filter.
pb_relic_murine_pipe.mechanicalEffects:
Tags: Grappling, Lethal, Returning, Thrown, Versatile 
Knack: By imbuing a Legend, the Scion may create a 
special kind of Sanctum by pulling a Midrealm up from the 
bottom of the ocean and tethering it to his Fate; he must be 
on (or in) a large body of saltwater at least a few miles from 
shore to use this Knack. Unlike other Sancta, this one-dot 
Sanctum begins as a Midrealm instead of a physical location, 
with a gate to which the key is performing a simple action 
to open it with the fishhook itself. It can also be reached 
through the Ocean Axis Mundi. As long as the Legend point 
remains imbued, the Scion can perform Deeds to tether it 
more closely to the mortal World. If he reclaims the Legend 
point… Condensed from printed Relics p. 185.

pb_relic_uis_fishhook.name: UI’S FISHHOOK (PB catalog)
pb_relic_uis_fishhook.description: The legendary fishhook of the Demigod Mantle Māui takes many forms and comes to Scion hands in many ways, all of which are inextricably tied to the Mantle’s Fate. See p. 81 for more information about this hero and his famous relic.
pb_relic_uis_fishhook.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Epic Strength, Water Motif: With my boasting, I catch what I seek. Tags: Grappling, Lethal, Returning, Thrown, Versatile 
Knack: By imbuing a Legend, the Scion may create a 
special kind of Sanctum by pulling a Midrealm up from the 
bottom of the ocean and tethering it to his Fate; he must be 
on (or in) a large body of saltwater at least a few miles from 
shore to use this Knack. Unlike other Sancta, this one-dot 
Sanctum begins as a Midrealm instead of a physical location, 
with a gate to which the key is performing a simple action 
to open it with the fishhook itself. It can also be reached 
through the Ocean Axis Mundi. As long as the Legend point 
remains imbued, the Scion can perform Deeds to tether it 
more closely to the mortal World. If he reclaims the Legend 
point…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: With my boasting, I catch what I seek.

pb_relic_nezhas_heart.name: NEZHA’S HEART (PB catalog)
pb_relic_nezhas_heart.description: In Ào Guāng’s palace, there is a box in a chest in a vault in a chamber that no one else is allowed to enter. Within the box is the heart of a God, still beating but long since desiccat ed into a leathery pod. This is the heart of Prince Nezha, who offered his internal organs to Ào Guāng in exchange for free ing his parents.
pb_relic_nezhas_heart.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Health Motif: Sacrifice balances the scales of life Knack: Although it holds no special powers of its own, 
both Ào Guāng and Prince Nezha value the heart and suffer 
+2 Difficulty to avoid bargains that offer it as payment.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Sacrifice balances the scales of life

pb_relic_oni_shout.name: ONI-SHOUT (PB catalog)
pb_relic_oni_shout.description: Wielded by one of Raijin’s modern Mantles, the Oni- Shout is a neon-yellow amp, its case scratched with thou sands of lightning bolts, one for every show it’s ever been used at. Raijin loans it out to promising Scion rockers of any pantheon, with the understanding that their shows better continue to impress.
pb_relic_oni_shout.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Sky Motif: I’m the center of attention. Enhancement: +3 to performances when connected to 
any instrument. 
Knack: While playing an amplified instrument, the 
owner can choose to be heard clearly over any other noise 
for up to (Legend) miles, inflicting a level 2 Complication 
on any attempt to steal focus from them. If not bought off, the heckler suffers the Deafened Condition, increasing the 
Difficulty of all hearing-related actions by 1 until they’ve had 
time to recover. 
Flaw: After a performance with the Oni-Shout, the 
owner suffers the Deafened Condition, and for the next day, 
any attempt to play an un-amplified instrument inflicts a 
level 3 Complication; if not bought off, the instrument falls 
apart in her hands.
OSHE OF SHÀNGÓ… Condensed from printed Relics p. 186.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: I’m the center of attention.

pb_relic_oyohualli.name: OYOHUALLI (PB catalog)
pb_relic_oyohualli.description: The oyohualli is a teardrop-shaped pendant made of mother of pearl. Xochipilli the Flower Prince hands them out to anyone who, in his estimation, needs to chill out and enjoy life — or who agrees to spread the good word to every one around her. This relic can be made into jewelry of var ious kinds, or can adorn weapons or clothing. Marvels and Boons it channels can apply to a variety of Passions, as long as they’re the kind that get people having fun and following their hearts.
pb_relic_oyohualli.mechanicalEffects: Purviews: Passion (varies) Motif: Stop and smell the flowers.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Stop and smell the flowers.

pb_relic_philosophers_stone.name: PHILOSOPHER’S STONE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_philosophers_stone.description: Enhancement: 1 when transforming an object into a significantly different form.. There are few relics in the world as sought after as the vaunted Philosopher’s Stone. Capable of turning lead to gold and believed to be able to create the Elixir of Life — granting the imbiber immortality — this wondrous object is only limited by its user’s will and imagination.
pb_relic_philosophers_stone.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Fortune, Prosperity Motif: If there is a will, there is a way. Enhancement: 1 when transforming an object into 
a significantly different form.. There are few relics in the 
world as sought after as the vaunted Philosopher’s Stone. 
Capable of turning lead to gold and believed to be able to 
create the Elixir of Life — granting the imbiber immortality 
— this wondrous object is only limited by its user’s will and 
imagination. Anyone who manages to attain the Philoso 
pher’s Stone, however, quickly finds themselves a target of 

 PANDORA’S BOX
those who seek the stone’s power; more than one would-be 
hero or god-king has died in the pursuit of or being in pos 
session of the Philosopher’s Stone. Condensed from printed Relics p. 187.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: If there is a will, there is a way.

pb_relic_rhongomiant.name: RHONGOMIANT (PB catalog)
pb_relic_rhongomiant.description: Enhancement: +1 to defend or counter Water Boons or marvels, or similar effects A king among the asura, the great dragon Vritra’s thirst is so immense it can’t be slaked by 100 rivers, or 1,000, or all the rivers of the World! Waterskins made from Vritra’s flesh — or the flesh of his titanspawn minions — are similarly relentless, absorbing water wherev er it is found.
pb_relic_rhongomiant.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: +1 to defend or counter Water Boons or 
marvels, or similar effects A king among the asura, the great 
dragon Vritra’s thirst is so immense it can’t be slaked by 100 
rivers, or 1,000, or all the rivers of the World! Waterskins 
made from Vritra’s flesh — or the flesh of his titanspawn 
minions — are similarly relentless, absorbing water wherev 
er it is found. 
Knack: Spend Momentum to spread drought up to long 
range, providing the skin’s Enhancement bonus to everyone 
nearby and reducing the size- or force-based Scale of such 
effects by one. Water evaporates or recedes, and even the 
sea dips down to low tide as the waterskin devours moisture 
wherever it is found.

pb_relic_scepter_of_the_only_god.name: SCEPTER OF THE ONLY GOD (PB catalog)
pb_relic_scepter_of_the_only_god.description: This rusted metal scepter is one of the few physical re mains of the Only God, and a sign of his authority. Purviews: Sun Motif: True glory is undeniable.
pb_relic_scepter_of_the_only_god.mechanicalEffects:
Knack: When you hold the scepter in a crowd or social 
event, make a Knack Skill roll. On a success, you may make 
a number of declarations equal to the number of successes 
rolled which everyone gathered hears. You have no control 
over how they react. 
Motif: All eyes on me. 
Requirement: The Scion must bring an offering of pre 
cious metals, fine incense, or anything else they consider of 
great monetary value to the Only God in his hall once per 
season. This offering must be made with a sincere sense of 
gratitude. Neglecting this offering seals the Scion from the 
hall, and they can only return with a penance offering of 
even greater monetary value. 
SCIONHEISER X-SERIES WIRELESS

pb_relic_scionheiser_x_series_wireless_m.name: SCIONHEISER X-SERIES WIRELESS MICROPHONE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_scionheiser_x_series_wireless_m.description: Unlucky Mercenary, the disputed Master of the Mic (Titans Rising, p. 38), has a microphone so powerful that it not only does it not need to be powered or plugged in, nei ther does anything else in the area if she chooses. Purviews: Artistry Motif: Brazenly brutal bass bolstering beautiful bombasts
pb_relic_scionheiser_x_series_wireless_m.mechanicalEffects:
Knack: Electronic devices you select within Short range 
function as though they were fully powered. Additionally, 
you may take a +2 difficulty to actions requiring secrecy or 
stealth for the remainder of the scene to reroll a failed Tech 
nology action. This reroll gains a 2 Enhancement and cannot 
result in a botch.

pb_relic_sequence.name: SEQUENCE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_sequence.description: Enhancement: +2 to stealth at night or in dark places The couture of the enigmatic clothier known as Snakewran gler is prized among fashion-forward Scions. These outfits are sewn from the skin of the Titan Apep, whose scales are so black as to consume all light that touches them.
pb_relic_sequence.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: +2 to stealth at night or in dark places 
The couture of the enigmatic clothier known as Snakewran 
gler is prized among fashion-forward Scions. These outfits 
are sewn from the skin of the Titan Apep, whose scales are 
so black as to consume all light that touches them. Snake 
wrangler acquires her stock when Apep sheds his skin every 
decade or so; although she has a waiting list of clientele, she gladly makes an exception for anyone brave enough to bring 
flesh freshly cleaved from the Titan himself. 
Tags: Soft (2) Condensed from printed Relics p. 190.

pb_relic_sharur_smasher_of_thousands.name: SHARUR, SMASHER OF THOUSANDS (PB catalog)
pb_relic_sharur_smasher_of_thousands.description: Enhancement: 1 when invoking Feats of Scale in com bat Ninurta rarely entrusts his sapient mace bearing 50 lion heads to Scions, as it’s the God’s best friend as well as his weapon. When he does, it’s a sign that either Ninurta really likes you, or is extremely desperate.
pb_relic_sharur_smasher_of_thousands.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Epic Strength, Sky Motif: For love of Ninurta, I smash your enemies! Enhancement: 1 when invoking Feats of Scale in com 
bat Ninurta rarely entrusts his sapient mace bearing 50 lion 
heads to Scions, as it’s the God’s best friend as well as his 
weapon. When he does, it’s a sign that either Ninurta really 
likes you, or is extremely desperate. Sometimes, though, 
Sharur advises its master to let one of his children wield it, 
deeming it a necessary tactical move for some inscrutable 
purpose. It can fly with its own wings, carry messages to and 
from, perform surveillance, and give fantastic hugs. Beyond 
that, it boasts of feats ranging from summoning storms and 
setting mountains on fire to tearing out the entrails of its 
wielder’s foes. When it’s in a good mood, it likes…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: For love of Ninurta, I smash your enemies!

pb_relic_silk_spider_shawl.name: SILK SPIDER SHAWL (PB catalog)
pb_relic_silk_spider_shawl.description: When a jorogumo — a spider-yōkai — hungers, it trans forms itself into the guise of a beautiful young woman and lures travelers into its webs. Their silk is as study as iron; those who escape with a sample of it find it resonates with a jorogumo’s cunning and often have it spun into a cloak, scarf, or shawl.
pb_relic_silk_spider_shawl.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Beasts (Spiders) Knack: Spend Momentum to transform the shawl into a 
set of spindly silken legs for the rest of the scene. With them, 
you can move effortlessly up walls or across ceilings.

pb_relic_sleipnir.name: SLEIPNIR (PB catalog)
pb_relic_sleipnir.description: The original Sleipnir wheelchair has existed since before humanity invented wheelchairs. Entering into Freyja’s record six hundred years ago, Sleipnir the chair predates Phillip II of Spain’s wheelchair. Records now indicate at least eight Sleipnir exist. They pass between Scions of the Æsir: Freyja assigned one of her Disir to track current ownership in her library (see p. 117 for more information about Sessrúmnir).
pb_relic_sleipnir.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Epic Dexterity, Beasts (Horses) Knack: Spend Momentum to activate Sleipnir’s legs, al 
lowing feats of Epic Dexterity for a scene. Sleipnir can climb 
walls, walk on water, or continue toward a set destination 
while the owner sleeps. Sleipnir has about as much intelli 
gence as a border collie and understands spoken commands. 
It will maneuver around obstacles or change direction rath 
er than run into hazards like fire. 
Motif: Rough terrains are as a smooth path to me. 
Suggested Alternate Figures: Hephaestus, Athena (pa 
tron of Talos the smith), Muzzu-kumikquae (cane), Éshú 
Elégbará (staff) Condensed from printed Relics p. 191.

pb_relic_smoking_mirror.name: SMOKING MIRROR (PB catalog)
pb_relic_smoking_mirror.description: This mirror is surprisingly small, a roughly twelve-inch diameter circular piece of strongly polished obsidian. The source of its construction is volcanic in nature, but relatively mundane. The polish applied to its surface, however, is al chemical in nature, causing this particular obsidian mirror to possess unique capabilities not shared with others of a similar design. John Dee, philosopher and chief occultist to the court of Queen Elizabeth the First, claims fame as the mirror’s creator.
pb_relic_smoking_mirror.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Death, Journey Motif: The most direct means of communication with the 
spirits of the dead. Knack: This relic grants a 2 Enhancement to summon 
ing the soul of any dead, regardless of how long ago they 
died. The deceased manifests as a hazy, fog-like figure in the 
polished reflection of the mirror for one scene. 
Flaw: The mirror’s fabled function is not entirely true. 
Rather than reflecting the souls of the dead for conversation 
with the living, the mirror actually captures them. The dead 
summoned into the mirror remain trapped within it, essen 
tially existing within an oubliette of obsidian, and come out 
to haunt the mirror’s owner.
SOMA (• - •••••)
Soma is the moon deity among the Devá, and his blood is 
the plant sap that makes their favorite drink. A soma plant is 
sacred, and by mixing…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags:
The most direct means of communication with the 
spirits of the dead.

pb_relic_heir_marks_so_they_cannot_escap.name: STORM HAG’S BREATH (PB catalog)
pb_relic_heir_marks_so_they_cannot_escap.description: Long ago, when Britain was still young and before Ar thur was king, there lived a woman known as the Storm Hag, or Cailleach Bhéara. Rumors and myth surrounded her, tak ing the form of her being a witch who could summon a fog that drove men mad, turning on their comrades in arms and slaying them indiscriminately. Those who court the blessing of the Cailleach Bhéara often receive it in the form of a small, sea-glass jar filled with what looks like smoke.
pb_relic_heir_marks_so_they_cannot_escap.mechanicalEffects: Purviews: Chaos, War Motif: There’s a mysterious fog rolling in...

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: There’s a mysterious fog rolling in...

pb_relic_storm_satchel.name: STORM SATCHEL (PB catalog)
pb_relic_storm_satchel.description: In tales of the storm titan Fūjin, he carries a bag full of winds, but in truth, his bags are many and manifold, and he is apt to misplace them. These rough-spun bags are usually bat tered and threadbare, and the winds inside rouse from time to time in fitful motions. Scions who claim a storm-satchel must attend it carefully, for it is a willful Relic, as spirited and mercurial as its Titanic master.
pb_relic_storm_satchel.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Sky Motif: The power of the winds, unleashed Flaw: Once per session, the Storyguide can have the 
storm-satchel take an action with a pool of six dice, leaping 
from the Scion’s grasp in a burst of wind. These actions are 
mischievous, but never (knowingly) dangerous.
STORM SEEDS (••• OR ••••)
Legendary 
Even in the age of near-perfect meteorology, devasting 
storms can catch the World by surprise. While most of these 
disasters have ordinary explanations, such as sudden shifts in 
temperature or wind currents, sometimes it’s a targeted ac 
tion. One of the many ways Ae-pungishimook inflicts terror and death across the land is with his Storm Seeds. They’re 
infertile birch tree seeds that, when tossed into the open sky, 
create violent storms in the… Condensed from printed Relics p. 192.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: The power of the winds, unleashed

pb_relic_sun_falcon_cap.name: SUN FALCON CAP (PB catalog)
pb_relic_sun_falcon_cap.description: Enhancement: 1 when instructing or leading others to perform a task that would move you toward your Duty Virtue Purviews: Order Motif: All must follow Inti’s design. Scions who wear this baseball cap with the symbol of the sun falcon emblazoned on it in shining gold radiate authority just as Inti does.
pb_relic_sun_falcon_cap.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: 1 when instructing or leading others to 
perform a task that would move you toward your Duty Virtue 
Purviews: Order 
Motif: All must follow Inti’s design. 
Scions who wear this baseball cap with the symbol of the 
sun falcon emblazoned on it in shining gold radiate authority 
just as Inti does. It’s popular with those who lead structured 
groups that must follow rules but can still easily dress down, 
like sports team coaches or construction crew managers. It’s 
not too uncommon to see army commanders, project manag 
ers, and teachers wearing it, either; once they don it, no one 
would dare to tell them it goes against the dress code. 
Knack: Trivial characters must follow any instruction 
or…

pb_relic_sword_of_kadath.name: SWORD OF KADATH (PB catalog)
pb_relic_sword_of_kadath.description: The Sword of Kadath’s origins remain unknown: the blade changes its appearance to suit its owner, and its re corded history shows it appearing as anything from a Roman gladius to a hook sword, a macuahuitl to a rapier. The only consistency in its appearance is an eldritch symbol engraved just before the guard, if the sword has a guard, or across the join between handle and blade.
pb_relic_sword_of_kadath.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Death, Deception Motif: It’s only a dream. It’s only a dream. It’s only— Knack: The Sword of Kadath travels with its owner 
always. If it is stolen, it returns to its owner the next time he 
sleeps, even disappearing from the hand of the person who 
stole it to return to its owner in his dreams so he may not 
go unarmed. This return to its owner may cause the sword 
to pass between realms of its own volition. It doesn’t matter 
where the sword is; it goes home. Ownership changes only 
by means known to the sword itself; rumors persist that 
killing a sentient being with the blade instills ownership, or 
perhaps killing the former owner, or dedicating a battle to 
one of the Great Old Ones. 
Tags: Lethal, Melee, Piercing, Unconcealable 
Flaw: The sword’s presence becomes addictive,… Condensed from printed Relics p. 193.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: It’s only a dream. It’s only a dream. It’s only—

pb_relic_taiko_of_the_thunders.name: TAIKO OF THE THUNDERS (PB catalog)
pb_relic_taiko_of_the_thunders.description: Enhancement: +2 when using the Boon Bold from the Blue (Scion: Hero, p. 259) Raijin likes drums. Raijin loves drums. Raijin, whose music is the sound of the thundering heavens, is truly the best at appreciating drums in the whole World. His collection includes literally millions of every shape, size, and make, but most famous among them all are the taiko drums that bear his tomoe symbol.
pb_relic_taiko_of_the_thunders.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Sky Motif: The sound and the fury Enhancement: +2 when using the Boon Bold from the 
Blue (Scion: Hero, p. 259) Raijin likes drums. Raijin loves 
drums. Raijin, whose music is the sound of the thundering 
heavens, is truly the best at appreciating drums in the whole 
World. His collection includes literally millions of every 
shape, size, and make, but most famous among them all are 
the taiko drums that bear his tomoe symbol. In the heat of 
battle, these drums oft go missing, and whatever rage he has 
at those who would abscond with them is quickly forgotten, 
for if Raijin likes anything more than having drums, it is 
making new ones.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: The sound and the fury

pb_relic_tezcatlipocas_foot.name: TEZCATLIPOCA’S FOOT (PB catalog)
pb_relic_tezcatlipocas_foot.description: Having replaced his foot with a smoking mirror, Tez catlipoca passed on to a favored child the secret of creating smoky obsidian mirror Relics. The bargain didn’t prohibit sharing the information with others. Thus, several of these prophetic items circulate among Teōtl Scions at present. Unless the owner activates the Knack, the foot appears as a prosthetic made of obsidian, but functions as a fully inte grated body part: the toes wiggle, the ankle flexes and rolls.
pb_relic_tezcatlipocas_foot.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Transformation Knack: Spend Momentum to transform the foot into 
a mirror and stare into it. You may stare for up to Legend 
turns and ask up to Legend ‘yes, no or maybe’ questions of 
the Storyguide. The Storyguide must answer those questions 
truthfully but may state ‘that depends on what you do’ if the 
question truly cannot be answered under current circum 
stances. The character receives these answers as images 
flashing in the mirror: the question ‘Is our opponent at home’ 
gets answered ‘no,’ an empty bedroom appears in the mirror. 
Motif: Reveal terrible truths in the heat haze. 
Suggested Alternate Figures: Viśpálā (foot), Nuada 
(hand), Hephaestus

pb_relic_the_alert.name: THE ALERT (PB catalog)
pb_relic_the_alert.description: The epistolary evidence which surrounds the ship Alert suggests a strange and winding history: the Alert’s journeys across the oceans brought it to its current berth in Oslo, through direct encounters with Cthulhu and a few days (A few years? A few eons? One cannot know) anchored off R’ly eh. Just as people who meet the Great Old Ones do not escape unscathed or unchanged, so the Alert came out of the other end of this epic journey different.
pb_relic_the_alert.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Journeys Motif: The person at the end of the voyage is not the per 
son from the beginning of the voyage. Knack: The Alert never runs out of fuel in an emergency; 
during moments of crisis, she runs regardless of how much coal 
remains on hand, like a human being running on adrenaline. She 
possesses at least some form of sapience, and will attempt to 
steer away from immediate danger, though she can be coaxed 
to head toward something which will damage her or her crew. 
Once per week, the Alert can be asked to direct herself toward 
any location where she has already traveled (including R’lyeh) 
and she will take over navigation; by some strange mechanism, 
no matter how far away the location, the Alert always arrives at 
her destination within one hour. She may also travel to a Terra 
Incognita which is new to… Condensed from printed Relics p. 195.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags:
The person at the end of the voyage is not the per 
son from the beginning of the voyage.

pb_relic_the_diamond_compass.name: THE DIAMOND COMPASS (PB catalog)
pb_relic_the_diamond_compass.description: Legendary Purviews: Liminal Motif: All places are alike to me. Now embedded in the arm or chest of its bearer, the Diamond Compass permits the bearer to move as fluidly through all Realms as if she owned them. My Mother’s House (Imbue 2 Legend): By activating the Diamond Compass, for the rest of the scene the Ilhm may treat her location as if it is her home Realm.

pb_relic_the_dragons_bounty.name: THE DRAGON’S BOUNTY (PB catalog)
