pb_relic_the_dragons_bounty.description: Legendary Sun Wukong performed one of the greatest heists in history and got away so clean that his victim’s stolen goods became his. Thought it meant little to him at the time, the staff became a symbol of the perfect treasure, something so inherently valuable that only a fool wouldn’t risk everything to have it. Purviews: Fortune, Prosperity Motif: I have what you don’t.
pb_relic_the_dragons_bounty.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: 1 to attempts to sway others using 
wealth, real or imagined. 
Tags: Bashing, Melee, Stun, Reach 
Knack: When you spend 1 Momentum and demonstrate 
the splendor or the Ruyi Jin Gu Bang to an opponent in bat 
tle, the desire to possess it overcomes them. For the rest of 
the battle, the opponent must attack whoever holds the staff, 
even if it’s no longer in your hands.

pb_relic_the_emerald_tablet.name: THE EMERALD TABLET (PB catalog)
pb_relic_the_emerald_tablet.description: Enhancement: 1 when used to research Occult matters Authored by Hermes Trismegistus — a collaborative pseud onym used by the Theoi and the Netjer gods Hermes and Thoth — the Emerald Tablet is a compendium of knowledge alchemical and arcane, believed to hold the key to creating powerful relics including the Philosopher’s Stone.
pb_relic_the_emerald_tablet.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Order Motif: We strive to know all. Enhancement: 1 when used to research Occult matters 
Authored by Hermes Trismegistus — a collaborative pseud 
onym used by the Theoi and the Netjer gods Hermes and 
Thoth — the Emerald Tablet is a compendium of knowledge 
alchemical and arcane, believed to hold the key to creating 
powerful relics including the Philosopher’s Stone. Many 
copies of the Emerald Tablet exist, one made of green clay 
and another of a massive emerald as an attempt to pass it off 
as the genuine article, but true scholars can recognize these 
fabrications for what they are: a mere piece of the full manu 
script, but enough to help them understand some mysteries 
of the universe.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: We strive to know all.

pb_relic_the_eye_of_horus.name: THE EYE OF HORUS (PB catalog)
pb_relic_the_eye_of_horus.description: Enhancements: +2 to see through deception or discern the truth Chephren, Scion of Horus, lost their eye when Buneb, Scion of Apep, drove his dagger into their eye. Chephren prostrated themself before their shrine to Horus for three days. They wept until they cried tears of blood, for they could no longer read at length. Post-injury migraines kept them from focusing on scrolls for long. Their father heard their weeping prayers and visited them.
pb_relic_the_eye_of_horus.mechanicalEffects: Purviews: Health Condensed from printed Relics p. 196.

pb_relic_s_a_guide_animal_granted_by_mic.name: THE GLASS COMPASS (PB catalog)
pb_relic_s_a_guide_animal_granted_by_mic.description: Now crafted of glass transmuted from its original quartz, the golden needle of the Glass Compass constantly hums. Never Strange In Any Land (Imbue 1 Legend): As per “Grounded” above, except the Glass Compass also works in Strange Places and Midrealms.
pb_relic_s_a_guide_animal_granted_by_mic.mechanicalEffects: Purviews: Liminal Motif: I am never lost; I navigate by my mother’s breath.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: I am never lost; I navigate by my mother’s breath.

pb_relic_the_holy_grail.name: THE HOLY GRAIL (PB catalog)
pb_relic_the_holy_grail.description: There are few relics as sought-after in the World as the Holy Grail. Many legends surround it, all of them holding a grain of truth as to what it is that the Grail represents. To some, it is the key to unrelenting joy and happiness. To others, it is a veritable fountain of youth and path to im mortality. In truth, it is whatever its beholder wishes it to be, for the Grail homes in on its bearer’s deepest desires and manifests them.
pb_relic_the_holy_grail.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Wild Motif: Call upon the lives and legends of those around 
you to stir the chaos within and give glorious birth. Knack: Calling upon the power of the Grail, its bearer can 
use any Immortal or Heroic Knack detailed in this book. How 
ever, the chosen Knack can only be used in the present scene, 
and once used, isn’t available again until the story concludes. 
Flaw: The Holy Grail is an unpredictable relic, not 
known for adhering to physics or limited mortal understand 
ing. When its bearer calls upon its power, roll a single die: 
if roll is even, the bearer gains Enhancement 2 on a single 
action. If the roll is odd, the bearer gains a +3 Complication 
to their next action

relicDetails.motifsAndTags:
Call upon the lives and legends of those around 
you to stir the chaos within and give glorious birth.

pb_relic_omplication_to_their_next_actio.name: THE IMMORTAL SERUM (PB catalog)
pb_relic_omplication_to_their_next_actio.description: Enhancement: 2 vs. trivial foes, 1 against foes of equal or higher rating Flaw: Once the serum is imbibed, the user cannot back down or run away from a fight until the objective is accom plished — even at the risk of their own life.
pb_relic_omplication_to_their_next_actio.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Epic Dexterity, Epic Strength Enhancement: 2 vs. trivial foes, 1 against foes of equal 
or higher rating 
Flaw: Once the serum is imbibed, the user cannot back 
down or run away from a fight until the objective is accom 
plished — even at the risk of their own life. A potent serum 
made with a mixture of haoma and lotus, the Immortal 
Serum increases the imbiber’s combat capabilities in both 
speed and strength, making them lethal fighting machines 
who lose all sense of self-preservation and focus solely on 
completing their objective. Using the serum is considered 
offensive within the ranks of the Immortals, and the inten 
tional use of it is frowned upon.

pb_relic_the_ivory_key.name: THE IVORY KEY (PB catalog)
pb_relic_the_ivory_key.description: The Ivory Key is a bulky object, far too impractical to mistake for an actual key. It is a long object comprised of sharp edges, spikes, and serrated edges, with only the circu lar handle the size of a human hand to give any semblance to an actual key. The Ivory Key is old; believed to have been carved from the horn of a woolly mammoth, and dated to the same historical era.
pb_relic_the_ivory_key.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Journey Motif: Though the Gates of Horn and Ivory, and into the 
realms beyond the dream Knack: The key plays a role in the evocation of a ritual, 
the function of which allows for the creation of a portal to any 
destination (known or unknown). This portal’s destination 
may reach to anywhere, including beyond the stars, through 
the realms of dreams, or across the span of time. In order to 
function, a doorway is required; this can be a physical door 
in a house, an illusionary gateway such as a drawing in chalk 
on the side of a cliff, or a metaphysical doorway such as a 
torii or standing stones. Starlight is required to illuminate 
the portal; this ritual can therefore only work at night. All 
in attendance spend Two Momentum to create the portal; 
only those who have spent Momentum are able… Condensed from printed Relics p. 197.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags:
Though the Gates of Horn and Ivory, and into the 
realms beyond the dream

pb_relic_the_kitty.name: THE KITTY (PB catalog)
pb_relic_the_kitty.description: The Kitty is a seemingly normal maneki-neko figurine with tan-colored fur and a beckoning right paw. It has a slot carved into its back not unlike a piggy bank, and the koban coin it holds changes to reflect the local currency of wherev er its owner is at the moment.
pb_relic_the_kitty.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Prosperity Motif: If you look hard enough, you can always scrounge 
up something. Knack: If turned upside down and shaken vigorously, 
the Kitty can provide a few hundred dollars’ worth of petty 
cash each scene in the form of local coinage and small bills.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags:
If you look hard enough, you can always scrounge 
up something.

pb_relic_the_stone_compass.name: THE STONE COMPASS (PB catalog)
pb_relic_the_stone_compass.description: A smooth quartz pebble set with a metal compass nee dle and often worn on a chain or thong around the neck, the needle of the Stone Compass never moves. It doesn’t need to: the user always knows where she is. Grounded (Imbue 1 Legend): By placing her bare feet on the ground and ex pending 1 Legend, the character gains an immutable sense of direction anywhere in the World.
pb_relic_the_stone_compass.mechanicalEffects: Purviews: Earth Motif: I am never lost on my mother’s World.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: I am never lost on my mother’s World.

pb_relic_the_sword_that_cuts_grass.name: THE SWORD THAT CUTS GRASS (PB catalog)
pb_relic_the_sword_that_cuts_grass.description: Susano-Ō pulled Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi from the tail of the dragon he slew and gifted it to his sister Amaterasu as an apology for his irresponsible behavior. Later, numerous emperors wielded it, until it fell into the hands of the prince Yamato Takeru. The sword earned its name when Yamato was trapped by an enemy warlord in a large field that burned on every side. He sliced at the grass to remove the fuel from the flame and discovered Kusanagi’s power to control the winds.
pb_relic_the_sword_that_cuts_grass.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Sky Motif: Who controls the battlefield rises on wings of valor. Tags: Lethal, Melee, Versatile 
Knack: The character may use the Grass-Cutter Stunt 
whenever he inflicts a successful hit with Kusanagi on an 
opponent or inanimate object, as follows. 
Grass-Cutter (1-3s): Create or suppress one feature in the 
Field in which the Scion stands, with a value equal to suc 
cesses spent. This effect lasts for a number of rounds equal to 
successes spent, and only one such effect can exist at a time. 
The feature must make sense within the bounds of what con 
trolling the wind or cutting with a blade could accomplish.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Who controls the battlefield rises on wings of valor.

pb_relic_twofold_guise.name: TWOFOLD GUISE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_twofold_guise.description: Enhancement: 1 when used to deceive or as a disguise Once, Eshu Elegbara walked through a village wearing a hat that was black on one side and red on the other. Half the vil lage saw only one side and insisted the hat was black, while the other half insisted the opposite. Eshu let them come to blows before he stepped in to show them that differing per spectives can both be right.
pb_relic_twofold_guise.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Deception Motif: Everything is a matter of perspective. Enhancement: 1 when used to deceive or as a disguise 
Once, Eshu Elegbara walked through a village wearing a hat 
that was black on one side and red on the other. Half the vil 
lage saw only one side and insisted the hat was black, while 
the other half insisted the opposite. Eshu let them come to 
blows before he stepped in to show them that differing per 
spectives can both be right. Scions wear all manner of dualis 
tic garments that embody the archetype of Eshu’s black-and-
red hat: scarves that display different patterns depending on 
the light, caps in two colors, reversible jackets, and so on. 

 PANDORA’S BOX
Through marvels, these help a Scion provoke conflict from 
nothing, see a situation from a… Condensed from printed Relics p. 199.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Everything is a matter of perspective.

pb_relic_tyrfing.name: TYRFING (PB catalog)
pb_relic_tyrfing.description: Enhancement: 1 when taking an action that fulfills an ex pected social obligation As the traditional tattoos of the Māori people, ordinary tā moko are celebrations of their culture, indications of a person’s mana, and works of art. Scions with relic tā moko can also use them to more directly strengthen communities, uplift others, and set a good example.
pb_relic_tyrfing.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: 1 when taking an action that fulfills an ex 
pected social obligation As the traditional tattoos of the Māori 
people, ordinary tā moko are celebrations of their culture, 
indications of a person’s mana, and works of art. Scions with 
relic tā moko can also use them to more directly strengthen 
communities, uplift others, and set a good example. 
Knack: Gain access to the Perfect Partner Knack (Sci 
on: Hero, p. 232). 
Knack: As a permanent addition to the Scion’s body, this 
relic can’t be stolen or destroyed short of killing the Scion or 
powerful magic, nor can bandmates borrow it. However, by 
touching another character with a Legend trait when you ac 
quire a new Fatebinding to any…

pb_relic_uaithne_harp_of_the_dagda.name: UAITHNE, HARP OF THE DAGDA (PB catalog)
pb_relic_uaithne_harp_of_the_dagda.description: Ireland’s coat of arms bears a noble harp, the most be loved musical instrument of the Tuatha Dé Danann, and it long ago adorned the banners of the High Kings of Ireland. The harp has been, at times, a symbol of righteous rebellious spirit. Bards and filid use them to accompany their scathing satire and beauteous poetry. The Dagda’s enchanted harp has many names: Uaithne; or Dur da Blá, the Oak of Two Blos soms; or Coir Cethar Chuin, the Four-Angled Music.
pb_relic_uaithne_harp_of_the_dagda.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Passion (Joy, Sorrow) Motif: Music sways the heart and defies the enemy. Knack: Uaithne allows its player to play the three sacred 
harp tunes: that of laughter, that of weeping, and that of slumber. 
In addition to using Passion Boons to coax joy and sorrow from 
listeners, the Scion can use Irresistible Impulse (Scion: Hero, 
p. 257) to fill someone with the urge to fall asleep immediately. 
Knack: If the Hero speaks or sings the secret words as 
a simple action, Uaithne responds to the call if it’s within 
medium range, flying to his hand. It makes an attack against 
anyone who tries to stop it or who stands in its way, and if 
the attack hits, it flies unhindered; the attack uses the Scion’s 
Might + Close Combat and has the following 
Tags: Lethal, Loud, Melee. 
Flaws: The…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Music sways the heart and defies the enemy.

pb_relic_verity.name: VERITY (PB catalog)
pb_relic_verity.description: Verity is an acoustic guitar passed from Hero to Hero for 50 years, the leftover of a counter-culture musician who at tempted Apotheosis but now lingers only in Verity and a hand ful of well-known but now anonymous folksongs. The guitar’s covered in so many stickers and scribbles that there’s not an inch of the original wood still visible, but these lend it an inimi table resonance that can’t be recreated — the sound of absolute authenticity.
pb_relic_verity.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Artistry Motif: This guitar topples tyrants. Enhancement: +2 to inspire hope or spur change. 
Knack: When you draw attention to an injustice or 
abuse as part of a performance with Verity, you gain the ben 
efits of the Rumor Miller Knack (Scion: Hero, p. 234), with 
the caveat that the information you spread has to be true and 
accurate to your understanding.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: This guitar topples tyrants.

pb_relic_volcanic_amulet.name: VOLCANIC AMULET (PB catalog)
pb_relic_volcanic_amulet.description: This amulet is made from shards of volcanic glass that shines with the inner red glow of still-molten magma. This amulet confers on its wearer protection from the immense heat that created it. Purviews: Fire Motif: The heart of the volcano rumbles.
pb_relic_volcanic_amulet.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: 1 to Athletics actions to avoid flames 
Knack: You may ignore all Complications from fire-based 
effects, such as Field Conditions, hazards, or Injury Conditions.

pb_relic_waka_canoe.name: WAKA CANOE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_waka_canoe.description: Enhancement: 2 when navigating the Ocean Axis Mundi PANDORA’S BOX Purviews: Journeys Motif: A true voyager always seeks the next new horizon. Despite the relic’s name, a waka canoe can be any kind of vessel or vehicle: actual canoes, cars, yachts, tanks, or even bicycles.
pb_relic_waka_canoe.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: 2 when navigating the Ocean Axis Mundi 

 PANDORA’S BOX
Purviews: Journeys 
Motif: A true voyager always seeks the next new horizon. 
Despite the relic’s name, a waka canoe can be any kind 
of vessel or vehicle: actual canoes, cars, yachts, tanks, or even 
bicycles. In the distant past, the Polynesian people and their 
Gods came from the island of Hawaiki in enormous, elabo 
rately decorated canoes with sails. Drawing on the Legends 
of those vessels, a waka canoe relic rewards both a yearning 
for home and the spirit of adventure. Condensed from printed Relics p. 201.

pb_relic_wasteland_prosthetic_arm.name: WASTELAND PROSTHETIC ARM (PB catalog)
pb_relic_wasteland_prosthetic_arm.description: Just like the broken World they survive in; the people of the lost lands endure though hardships and rebuild them selves to survive and fight another day. Prosthetics of all sorts are common and of trivial access, but this metallic arm that attaches at elbow’s height — a limb made from pistons, gears, and iron parts — has a reputation that makes it the stuff of legends. It is said to have belonged to a legacy of great warriors who refused to kneel to any tyrant.
pb_relic_wasteland_prosthetic_arm.mechanicalEffects:
Motif: Wounds reforged into strength and fury. Enhancement: +2 to Close Combat and Firearms rolls 
made while on a high-speed moving vehicle. 
Knack: The Arm can change into a blade with the 
Lethal, Melee, and Unconcealable tags, a shotgun with the 
Firearm, Lethal, Loud, and Ranged tags, or a flamethrower 
with the Automatic, Brutal, Lethal, Loud, Messy, Ranged, and 
Unconcealable tags. 
Flaw: If the owner rolls a botch while using it in any 
of its shapes, the Arm stops working until and doesn’t grant 
any bonuses fixed with a successful Technology + Intellect 
(difficulty 3) roll.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Wounds reforged into strength and fury.

pb_relic_whetstone_of_judgement.name: WHETSTONE OF JUDGEMENT (PB catalog)
pb_relic_whetstone_of_judgement.description: The Tyrant’s special forces use this whetstone to sharp en their ceremonial swords. These blades are used to make public examples of criminals. Purviews: Order Motif: The deeper the infraction, the deeper the wound.
pb_relic_whetstone_of_judgement.mechanicalEffects:
Knack: When you attack someone whom you know 
broke a law, code, or promise with a bladed weapon sharp 
ened with this whetstone, the weapon gains the Brutal tag if 
it doesn’t already have it. 
Motif: I tolerate no judgement other than my own. 
Requirement: The Scion must attend a trial the Tyrant 
holds once per season. It’s always a show trial, and the citi 
zens of Céide always disagree with the verdict but can never 
effectively oppose it. Each trial demonstrates one of the Ty 
rant’s weaknesses, which could be used against him should 
the Scion ever decided to help the people rise against him.

pb_relic_white_water_harpoon.name: WHITE WATER HARPOON (PB catalog)
pb_relic_white_water_harpoon.description: Enhancement: 1 when used as a weapon against beasts of the wild Tags: Lethal, Melee, Piercing Long before the advent of projectile harpoons, the best weapon to hunt large sea game was composed of two pieces of wood, spliced together, with either a mussel shell or barbed elk horns as the piercing tip.
pb_relic_white_water_harpoon.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Wild Enhancement: 1 when used as a weapon against beasts 
of the wild 
Tags: Lethal, Melee, Piercing 
Long before the advent of projectile harpoons, the best 
weapon to hunt large sea game was composed of two pieces 
of wood, spliced together, with either a mussel shell or barbed 
elk horns as the piercing tip. The Hoh Whalers of the Wild 
Hunt know that for all that high-powered projectile weaponry 
is worth, the truest way to hunt is by using the land’s own re 
sources to aid you, and the White-Water Harpoon is the surest 
way to reconnect with the wild, primal aspects of a hunt.

pb_relic_windcutter.name: WINDCUTTER (PB catalog)
pb_relic_windcutter.description: Karen Jamison, Scion of Juracán, carries with her a blade made of the silence of the eye of a hurricane. This blade is razor sharp and invisible to the eyes of mortals. Demigod Purviews: Sky Motif: The calm belies the fury of the storm.
pb_relic_windcutter.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: 2 to attacks made with the sword. 
Tags: Aggravated, Lethal, Melee 
Knack: As a simple action, you create a blast of wind 
that can knock down opponents out to Short range. All oppo 
nents suffer a Complication (4c) on their next action. Failure 
to buy it off knocks them prone.

pb_relic_xiuhcoatl_the_flaming_serpent.name: XIUHCOATL, THE FLAMING SERPENT (PB catalog)
pb_relic_xiuhcoatl_the_flaming_serpent.description: With this atlatl, or spear-thrower, the war God Huitzilo pochtli banishes night and incinerates his enemies, sling ing not spears but bright tongues of flame from its carved turquoise shaft. These are the nagual, or spirit form, of the fire god Xiuhtecuhtli made manifest, conjured by relentless aggressive intent. A Hero who commits fully to her fight may ignite her foes and dispel darkness with abandon.
pb_relic_xiuhcoatl_the_flaming_serpent.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Fire Motif: A flame’s light banishes all darkness. Tags: Arcing, Lethal, Ranged 
Knack: Xiuhcoatl’s wielder can learn Blinding Glory as 
a Fire boon. 
Knack: The Scion can sling thin spears as normal with 
the atlatl, but she can also throw serpent-shaped flames, 
adding the Aggravated tag to these attacks and always 
causing burn-related Injury Conditions. Each point of Mo 
mentum she spends per attack grants it Enhancement 1, to 
a maximum of +3. 
Knack: If the Hero uses the Heaven’s Fire boon through 
Xiuhcoatl, she may spend a Legend instead of imbuing it for 
the scene to make a single attack that adds the Shockwave tag 
to the boon’s usual traits. 
Flaws: Once Xiuhcoatl’s wielder makes a flame attack 
with it, she can’t back down from the fight. She…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: A flame’s light banishes all darkness.

pb_relic_yithian_mind_stone.name: YITHIAN MIND STONE (PB catalog)
pb_relic_yithian_mind_stone.description: Long ago, on a distant planet, the Great Race of Yith slung their minds across the vastness of space simply be cause they could; they put their consciousness into the minds of others, taking control of their bodies so that they may live on Earth or other planets as they choose. Rumors persist that they walk the Earth even now, moving between the bodies of men, creatures, and even the planet itself.
pb_relic_yithian_mind_stone.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Journeys, Sky Motif: I see you. Knack: Choose one of the two following abilities upon 
purchase of the Yithian Mind Stone. This choice is perma 
nent and may not later be altered. Astral Projection: The 
stone’s owner falls unconscious, casting her mind out into 
the universe. She may navigate as if she is a ghost, flying and 
passing through solid objects. She may use any Knacks or 
other powers which do not require physical interaction with 
objects. Ghosts and other insubstantial beings may interact 
with her or attack her; she retains her Health levels and may 
be killed while astral. Her body is vulnerable to attack; she 
will not know if someone attacks her so it’s best to have a 
trusted companion guarding her body. She may return to…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: I see you.

pb_relic_zipacnas_tooth.name: ZIPACNA’S TOOTH (PB catalog)
pb_relic_zipacnas_tooth.description: This spear is made of solid stone, inlaid with gold. It is crafted from one of Zipacna’s teeth and is the key to this Realm. Purviews: Epic Strength Motif: Through might alone, I prosper.
pb_relic_zipacnas_tooth.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: 1 for melee attacks 
Tags: Lethal, Melee, Reach

pb_relic_canthrig_bwt.name: CANTHRIG BWT (PB catalog)
pb_relic_canthrig_bwt.description: As a Demigod, children of Ysbaddaden are likely to have a close relationship with a powerful cewri whose name carries its own Legends. Canthrig Bwt is a giantess witch with a taste for human flesh. As with most cewri, she is a powerhouse of strength, but she is also versed in magic and ruthlessly cunning.
pb_relic_canthrig_bwt.mechanicalEffects:
Tags: Archetype (Consultant, Heavy) Helpful, Knack 
(Presence of Magic), Terrible (Size), Tough

pb_relic_hunters_horn.name: HUNTER’S HORN (PB catalog)
pb_relic_hunters_horn.description: Enhancement: 1 to using War boons Through the cen turies, hunters have used horns to signal the beginning of a hunt. This became a means to communicate across great distances, informing other parties through varying calls and patterns that their prey was afoot.
pb_relic_hunters_horn.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: War Motif: Answer the call, and lay waste to your prey. Enhancement: 1 to using War boons Through the cen 
turies, hunters have used horns to signal the beginning of 
a hunt. This became a means to communicate across great 
distances, informing other parties through varying calls and 
patterns that their prey was afoot. Their form has changed 
over the years — sometimes even a bugle works — but a 
classic hunter’s horn, fashioned from horn or bone and dec 
orated in elaborate scrimshaw depicting former hunts and 
victories, is most common.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Answer the call, and lay waste to your prey.

pb_relic_binding_nail.name: BINDING NAIL (PB catalog)
pb_relic_binding_nail.description: The Binding Nail was once a Tibetan phurba used in exorcism and meditative practice, but over the centuries, it’s been reduced to only its blade: a six-inch nail of meteoric iron that retains a fraction of its spiritual power. Many of them exist around the World, and Scions of the Palas are of ten eager to get their hands on one, speculating about what it might be capable of when fully reconstructed.
pb_relic_binding_nail.mechanicalEffects:
Knack: When the owner drives the Nail into a fixed, solid, 
horizontal surface, they choose a target within medium range, 
then make a Might + (Athletics, Close Combat, or Occult) roll. 
Any success prevents the target from moving further from 
the Nail than that distance unless they overcome the hold by 
beating the initial number of successes on an equivalent roll. 
Knack: By driving the Nail into a fixed, solid, vertical 
surface and choosing herself as a target, the owner is able to 
scale walls at normal movement speed so long as she remains 
within Medium range. In both cases, the owner can call the 
Nail back to her hand at any time as a reflexive action. If not 
summoned by the end of the scene, it… Condensed from printed Relics p. 166.

pb_relic_sharkskin_coat.name: SHARKSKIN COAT (PB catalog)
pb_relic_sharkskin_coat.description: Both defensive measure and fashion statement, the Sharkskin Coat is one of Sebetti’s gifts to promising Scions. It’s made of sharkskin in both senses of the word. As a gar ment, it’s a light jacket made from a luxurious blend of fab rics with an eye-catching sheen. When its user is threatened, the jacket transforms into a full-body set of armor made from the skin of sharks, imbuing the user with their tenacity and speed. The Sharkskin Coat is available in a variety of tasteful colors.
pb_relic_sharkskin_coat.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: 1 to the Roll Away Defensive Stunt. 
Tags: Innocuous, Concealable, Soft 
Knack: Spend 1 Momentum to transform the Shark 
skin Coat from garment to armor, applying all its Tags. The 
Sharkskin Coat stays in its armored form for the rest of the 
scene. The player may continue to spend Momentum to keep 
it active in consecutive scenes, 1 point for each scene. The 
Sharkskin Coat may change back into a garment at any time 
for no cost. Both transformations are a reflexive action. 
SHARUR, SMASHER OF THOUSANDS 
(•••••)
Purviews: Epic Strength, Sky 
Motif: For love of Ninurta, I smash your enemies! 
Enhancement: 1 when invoking Feats of Scale in com 
bat Ninurta rarely entrusts his sapient mace bearing…

pb_relic_pocket_merlin.name: POCKET MERLIN (PB catalog)
pb_relic_pocket_merlin.description: Anyone can download Pocket Merlin and receive messages from the Great and Powerful Magician, but who knows if what they say will come true. Are these messages meant for the you of today or was it meant for yesterday? Or perhaps it is meant for the future you. Only Pocket Merlin knows for sure, and his source code is a carefully kept secret.
pb_relic_pocket_merlin.mechanicalEffects:
Knack: A Scion can ask a question of the Pocket Merlin 
and receive an answer that gives a +1 Enhancement to act on 
Pocket Merlin’s advice.

pb_relic_yorubaland_racer.name: YORUBALAND RACER (PB catalog)
pb_relic_yorubaland_racer.description: Ògún loves trains, so it was only a matter of time be fore the God of Iron built his own. The Yorubaland Racer is a locomotive with an appearance similar to the Nigerian Railways 1001 Class diesel-electric locomotive. Unlike those locomotives, the Yourbaland Racer runs on infinite energy, goes as fast as the operator needs it to, and can traverse anywhere railed tracks exist, from the World to the Terra Incognita, and even Ògún’s Godsrealm.
pb_relic_yorubaland_racer.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: 3 towards all Pilot rolls when driving 
the locomotive. 
Knack: When you blow the conductor’s whistle by a 
railroad track, the Yorubaland Racer appears on your next 
turn. Unless supernatural intervention delays or prevents 
its arrival, the locomotive always arrives on time, no matter 
how busy the railway it’s summoned on might be. 
Knack: The Yorubaland Racer can travel on any track in 
any condition, or any portion of land that once held a track. 
This includes subways, bullet trains, and streetcar tracks. Condensed from printed Relics p. 203.

pb_relic_measurer_of_seas.name: MEASURER OF SEAS (PB catalog)
pb_relic_measurer_of_seas.description: Do you know why the Ruyi Jin Gu Bang can get so long? If you take a close look at the notches on the staff, you’ll see why: it was made to measure seas and oceans to perfect ac curacy. A little knowledge of the truth depths of the seas can go a long way. Purviews: Water Motif: I know the sea as well as I know myself.
pb_relic_measurer_of_seas.mechanicalEffects:
Enhancement: 4 to Athletics and Survival Rolls when 
in deep bodies of water. 
Tags: Bashing, Melee, Stun, Reach, Long Range 
Knack: (Imbue 1 Legend): When you are within reach 
of any large body of water, such as a lake, ocean, or river, you 
may use the Enforcing the Boundary Immortal Knack (Sci 
on: Hero, p. 231) as if you had it active, except you are also 
capable of making Rush and Disengage actions.

pb_relic_gede_boa.name: Gede Boa (PB catalog)
pb_relic_gede_boa.description: While Barons Cimitière and La Croix can be stodgy, Sa medi and other Gede Barons revel in human sexuality, don ning flamboyant guises with attire to match. A Gede Boa is one such accoutrement — a feather boa in provocative neon colors meant to draw attention. The Barons are extremely casual with them, likely to hand them over to anyone who interests them…or who they think could use a push to “live a little.”
pb_relic_gede_boa.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Passions Motif: Be your most fabulous, unapologetic self. Enhancement: +3 to attract attention as the center of 
a crowd. 
Knack: The wearer can imbue 1 Legend to change their 
physical characteristics (hair, eyes, skin, sex, height, etc.) 
to anything mortally possible. They may spend 1 Legend to 
make these changes permanent instead. If they loan the boa 
to another character, they may imbue or spend Legend on 
their behalf with that owner’s consent. 
Flaw: For a full day after wearing the boa, attempts to 
go unnoticed suffer a level 2 Complication; if not bought off, 
you leave behind a distinctive trail of overpowering cologne, 
plastic beads, or glitter.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Be your most fabulous, unapologetic self.

pb_relic_tezcatlipocas_mirror.name: Tezcatlipoca’s Mirror (PB catalog)
pb_relic_tezcatlipocas_mirror.description: The obsidian mirrors of Tezcatlipoca unveil many secrets, even those a Scion may not wish to know. These come in many shapes and sizes — some are massive discs of polished, night-black glass set in heavy frames to hang upon a wall, while others masquerade as compact mirrors or grace the inner surfaces of pocket-watch cases. A Hero may consult such a mirror to see what has not yet come to pass, to scry upon faraway places, or to read the heart’s darkest desires.
pb_relic_tezcatlipocas_mirror.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Fortune Motif: Secrets beg for revelation; mysteries beg for solution. Knack: The mirror’s wielder can learn Blurt It Out as a 
Fortune boon, but rather than speaking aloud, the subject is 
reflected in the mirror and their thoughts are clear to anyone 
who can see them in the glass. 
Knack: By imbuing the mirror with a Legend point, the 
Scion may view what’s happening in a given location from 
anywhere, as long as she’s been there before. She may do this 
indefinitely, but can’t take any non-reflexive actions while 
she does so and can’t apply her Defense. 
Flaws: Tezcatlipoca’s favor is as fickle as fortune itself. 
Each time the Scion scries with the mirror or channels a 
Purview through it, the Storyguide adds one point to the 
Tension Pool.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Secrets beg for revelation; mysteries beg for solution.

pb_relic_zmei_fang_necklace.name: Zmei-Fang Necklace (PB catalog)
pb_relic_zmei_fang_necklace.description: The World isn’t as it should be: people toil and suffer as if trapped in a cycle they cannot break, nature bleeds in pain, and unaddressed injustices abound. Awareness of it all spawns a poisonous anger within, but spitting it out in tunes, words, performances, and art can turn all that venom into something precious upon which a better future can be built.
pb_relic_zmei_fang_necklace.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Beasts, Fertility Motif: Anger nourishes both life and destruction. Enhancement: +1 to tend to animals or plants. 
Knack: As reflexive action, the owner can turn the fang 
into a greatsword with the Lethal, Melee, Messy, Two-Hand 
ed, and Unconcealable tags or turn it back into a necklace. 
Flaw: Supernatural poison taints the relic’s essence. 
If the wielder rolls a botch during an attack or the relic is 
destroyed, they gain the Poisoned Condition until the end 
of the scene. 
SANCTUM
A 
Sanctum is a place the Scion’s Legend inhabits. It starts 
off as a physical place within the World, but she can 
expand it to encompass Terra Incognita and even metaphorical 
representations of her Mantle. As her Sanctum grows, they 
may be able to roam the World and Otherworlds at her…

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: Anger nourishes both life and destruction.

pb_relic_owlpedia.name: Owlpedia 5 (PB catalog)
pb_relic_owlpedia.description: Legendary Owlpedia is a tablet that contains a digital encyclopedia. Through divine circuitry, it learns from new experiences. The current fifth generation holds an entire quettabyte of data, the equivalent of several trillion super computers. Purviews: Journeys, Order Motif: All the World’s public knowledge…right at your fingertips!
pb_relic_owlpedia.mechanicalEffects:
Knack: Once per session, the character may ask up to 
three questions of their choosing about any publicly known in 
formation about a person, place, or object in the current scene, 
no matter how obscure. The Storyguide must answer truthfully.

pb_relic_der_konig_in_gelb.name: Der König in Gelb (PB catalog)
pb_relic_der_konig_in_gelb.description: It was common in the early years of the twentieth cen tury for stage and film to cross paths, with recordings of the atrical performances recorded and displayed to audiences the world over. German expressionist filmmaker Fritz Lang frett, a former vaudeville stagehand, undertook one such recording in 1924. His film, Der König in Gelb, is one of early cinema’s most elusive lost films. The recording comprised of two reels; the first remains in the hands of an anonymous wealthy collector.
pb_relic_der_konig_in_gelb.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Star, Death, Journey Motif: They recorded it. What madness! Knack: The fact that Langfrett was an adamant cultist 
in service to ancient entities from Aldebaran is unsurpris 
ingly missing from film history. In practice, the recording 
perfectly captured the ritual of The King in Yellow, sealing 
the rite’s mystical properties within a cage of celluloid. 
Viewing both reels of the film in their entirety has the same 
effect as a performance of the play, but without the necessity 
of actors or scripts. All that is required is a film projector of 
an appropriate age; no dice rolls are required to perform the 
ritual in this manner. 
Flaw: Perhaps mercifully, both reels are required for 
this performance; the second has been lost for almost a 
century. Should it be… Condensed from printed Relics p. 169.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: They recorded it. What madness!

god_relic_mjolnir.name: Mjolnir (God-tier sample)
god_relic_mjolnir.description: Often imitated, but never truly replicated, the true Mjolnir — the one which Thor himself, and Thor alone, has wielded — is a sight to behold. It radiates power, with ripples of electricity crackling as soon as it is handled. Crafted by the dwarf brothers Eitri and Brokkr, it is part of a fuller regalia including a belt and iron gloves worn by Thor during his greatest adventures.
god_relic_mjolnir.mechanicalEffects:
Purviews: Epic Dexterity, Epic Strength, Sky Motif: The strongest thunder is felt before it’s heard. Enhancement: 1 to defeat opponents of equal or 
greater Tier
Knack: The Scion imbues a number of Legend points 
into Mjolnir and gains that many dots of Might for a scene. 
This can exceed 5 Might.
Tags: Lethal, Melee, Returning, Shockwave, Thrown, 
Versatile
Requirement: To fully unlock the legendary power of 
Mjolnir, user must also be equipped with the Megingjörð 
— the Power Belt. Otherwise, it remains inert, and access to 
its Purviews and Knack are restricted. Condensed from printed Relics p. 176.

relicDetails.motifsAndTags: The strongest thunder is felt before it’s heard.
